Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*
In this file we conclude that any monoidal category has a "Monoidal Rezk-completion".  More precisely:
Let (C,T,I,lu,ru,α) be a monoidal category.
Then, there is a univalent monoidal category (D,TD,ID,luD,ruD,αD) which is the free univalent monoidal category/replacement of (C,T,I,lu,ru,α), i.e.
There is a strong monoidal functor H: (C,T,I,lu,ru,α) → (D,TD,ID,luD,ruD,αD)
such that for any univalent monoidal category (E,TE,IE,luE,ruE,αD), there is an (adjoint) equivalence of categories between (lax-)monoidal functor categories:
H · (-) : LaxMon(D,E) → LaxMon(C,E).

In order to show this, we assume that the underlying category, i.e. C, has a Rezk-completion.
However, the specific constructions of the Rezk-completion of (ordinary) categories has some issues:
1. The copresheaf construction increases the universe level
2. The inductive definition, as the name suggests, uses inductive types, which is not directly allowed in UniMath.
In order to solve this issue, we are given a univalent category D and a weak equivalence H:C->D

Remark:
That H might be choosen to be a weak equivalence is motivated by the copresheaf construction.
We explicitely use that H is a weak equivalence (as seen in LiftedTensor.v) because
in order to show the adjoint equivalence of the corresponding monoidal functor categories,
we use that the functor categories are univalent and hence it suffices to show
that precomposition with H is a weak equivalence which reduces to H being an equivalence.

Notice that by the universal property of the Rezk-completion,
both D and H are unique (at first sight up to isomorphism, but even up to equality since the bicategory of univalent categories is univalent.

Then, using the universal property of D as the Rezk-completion of C (i.e. the free univalent category of C),
that D can be equipped with a monoidal structure such that H becomes a strong monoidal functor.
By the universal property of (D,H) we have an (adjoint) equivalence of categories H · (-) : [D,E] → [C,E] (for any univalent category E).
We show that this equivalence of categories lifts to (lax-)monoidal functors.
*)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.catiso.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecompEquivalence.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.ProductCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Total.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.TotalCategoryFacts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Constructions.Product.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Constructions.FullSubcategory.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.AlternativeDefinitions.MonoidalCategoriesTensored.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.AlternativeDefinitions.MonoidalFunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.RezkCompletion.LiftedTensor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.RezkCompletion.LiftedTensorUnit.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.RezkCompletion.LiftedUnitors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.RezkCompletion.LiftedAssociator.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section RezkMonoidal.

  Context {C D : category} {H : functor C D}
          (Duniv : is_univalent D)
          (H_eso : essentially_surjective H)
          (H_ff : fully_faithful H).

  Context (TC : functor (C ⊠ C) C) (I : C)
          (lu : left_unitor TC I)
          (ru : right_unitor TC I)
          (α : associator TC)
          (tri : triangle_eq TC I lu ru α)
          (pent : pentagon_eq TC α).

  Let TD := TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC.
  Let ID := (H I).
  Let luD := TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff _ _ lu.
  Let ruD := TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff _ _ ru.
  Let αD := TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff _ α.

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
triangle_eq TD (H I) luD ruD αD

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
triangle_eq TD (H I) luD ruD αD

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
y1, y2: D
# TD (pr1 ruD y1 #, id y2) =
pr1 αD ((y1, H I), y2) · # TD (id y1 #, pr1 luD y2)

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
y1, y2: D
UU
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
y1, y2: D
isaprop
  (# TD (pr1 ruD y1 #, id y2) =
   pr1 αD ((y1, H I), y2) · # TD (id y1 #, pr1 luD y2))
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
y1, y2: D
?X
→ # TD (pr1 ruD y1 #, id y2) =
  pr1 αD ((y1, H I), y2) · # TD (id y1 #, pr1 luD y2)

  (H I)

y1, y2: D
∥ ?X ∥

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D

TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C

pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor

  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
y1, y2: D
UU
 exact (∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) y1).

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C

pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D

  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
y1, y2: D
isaprop
  (# TD (pr1 ruD y1 #, id y2) =
   pr1 αD ((y1, H I), y2) · # TD (id y1 #, pr1 luD y2))
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
y1, y2: D
(∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) y1)
→ # TD (pr1 ruD y1 #, id y2) =
  pr1 αD ((y1, H I), y2) · # TD (id y1 #, pr1 luD y2)
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
y1, y2: D
∃ a : C, z_iso (H a) y1

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

  (H I)

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
y1, y2: D
isaprop
  (# TD (pr1 ruD y1 #, id y2) =
   pr1 αD ((y1, H I), y2) · # TD (id y1 #, pr1 luD y2))
 apply homset_property.

H: C ⟶ D

α: associator TC

pent: pentagon_eq TC α

x1: C

pr1 αD ((y1, H I), y2) · # TD (id y1 #, pr1 luD y2)

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
y2: D
x1: C
xx1: z_iso (H x1) (H x1)
# TD (pr1 ruD (H x1) #, id y2) =
pr1 αD ((H x1, H I), y2)
· # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 luD y2)

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
y2: D
x1: C
# TD (pr1 ruD (H x1) #, id y2) =
pr1 αD ((H x1, H I), y2)
· # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 luD y2)

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
y2: D
x1: C
isaprop
  (# TD (pr1 ruD (H x1) #, id y2) =
   pr1 αD ((H x1, H I), y2)
   · # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 luD y2))
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
y2: D
x1: C
?X
→ # TD (pr1 ruD (H x1) #, id y2) =
  pr1 αD ((H x1, H I), y2)
  · # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 luD y2)

lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC

pent: pentagon_eq TC α

  (H I)

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
y2: D
x1, x2: C
xx2: z_iso (H x2) y2
# TD (pr1 ruD (H x1) #, id y2) =
pr1 αD ((H x1, H I), y2)
· # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 luD y2)

# TD (pr1 ruD (H x1) #, id H x2) =
pr1 αD ((H x1, H I), H x2)
· # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 luD (H x2))

pr1 ruD (H x1) = ?y'

      exact (TransportedRightUnitorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru x1).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor

  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor

  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
# TD
  (LiftPreservesPostTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I x1
   · # H (ru x1) #, id H x2) =
pr1 αD ((H x1, H I), H x2)
· # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 luD (H x2))

· # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 luD (H x2))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
?t1 = pr1 luD (H x2)

      exact (! TransportedLeftUnitorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu x2).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
# TD
  (LiftPreservesPostTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I x1
   · # H (ru x1) #, id H x2) =
pr1 αD ((H x1, H I), H x2)
· # TD
    (id H x1
    #, LiftPreservesPretensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I x2
       · # H (lu x2))


    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C

α: associator TC

pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
# TD
  (LiftPreservesPostTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I x1
   · # H (ru x1) #, id H x2) = ?b
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I

α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α

?b =

· # TD

       · # H (lu x2))

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
# TD
  (LiftPreservesPostTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I x1
   · # H (ru x1) #, id H x2) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC ((x1, I), x2)
· # H (α ((x1, I), x2))
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    ((x1, I), x2)
· # TD
    (id H x1
    #, LiftPreservesPretensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I x2
       · # H (lu x2))


    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I

pent: pentagon_eq TC α

# TD
  (LiftPreservesPostTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I x1
   · # H (ru x1) #, id H x2 · id H x2) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC ((x1, I), x2)
· # H (α ((x1, I), x2))
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    ((x1, I), x2)
· # TD
    (id H x1
    #, LiftPreservesPretensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I x2
       · # H (lu x2))

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C

α: associator TC

   #, id H x2) · (# H (ru x1) #, id H x2)) =

· # H (α ((x1, I), x2))
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    ((x1, I), x2)
· # TD
    ((id H x1
     #, LiftPreservesPretensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
          x2) · (id H x1 #, # H (lu x2)))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D

  #, id H x2) · # TD (# H (ru x1) #, id H x2) =

    ((x1, I), x2)
· # TD

     #, LiftPreservesPretensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I

H: C ⟶ D

  #, # H (id x2)) · # TD (# H (ru x1) #, # H (id x2)) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC ((x1, I), x2)
· # H (α ((x1, I), x2))
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    ((x1, I), x2)
· # TD

     #, LiftPreservesPretensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
# TD (# H (ru x1) #, # H (id x2)) =
(pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
  (I_posttensor TC I x1, x2)
· # (TC ∙ H) (ru x1 #, id x2)
· pr1
    (pr2 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (x1, x2))
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I

α: associator TC

pent: pentagon_eq TC α

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)

  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
p0: # TD (# H (ru x1) #, # H (id x2)) =
(pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
  (I_posttensor TC I x1, x2)
· # (TC ∙ H) (ru x1 #, id x2)
· pr1
    (pr2
       (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (x1, x2))
# TD
  (LiftPreservesPostTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I x1
  #, # H (id x2)) · # TD (# H (ru x1) #, # H (id x2)) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC ((x1, I), x2)
· # H (α ((x1, I), x2))
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    ((x1, I), x2)
· # TD
    ((id H x1
     #, LiftPreservesPretensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
          x2) · (id H x1 #, # H (lu x2)))

H: C ⟶ D

# TD (# H (ru x1) #, # H (id x2)) =
(pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
  (I_posttensor TC I x1, x2)
· # (TC ∙ H) (ru x1 #, id x2)
· pr1
    (pr2 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (x1, x2))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α

  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
(pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
  (I_posttensor TC I x1, x2)
· # (TC ∙ H) (ru x1 #, id x2)
· pr1
    (pr2 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (x1, x2)) = # TD (# H (ru x1) #, # H (id x2))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
(pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
  (I_posttensor TC I x1, x2)
· # (TC ∙ H) (ru x1 #, id x2) =
# TD (# H (ru x1) #, # H (id x2))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr1
       (nat_z_iso_inv
          (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
       (x1, x2),,
     pr2
       (nat_z_iso_inv
          (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
       (x1, x2))

      exact (! pr21 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) _ _ (ru x1 #, id x2)).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

  (I_posttensor TC I x1, x2)
· # (TC ∙ H) (ru x1 #, id x2)
· pr1
    (pr2
       (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (x1, x2))
# TD
  (LiftPreservesPostTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I x1
  #, # H (id x2)) · # TD (# H (ru x1) #, # H (id x2)) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC ((x1, I), x2)
· # H (α ((x1, I), x2))
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    ((x1, I), x2)
· # TD
    ((id H x1
     #, LiftPreservesPretensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
          x2) · (id H x1 #, # H (lu x2)))


    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
p0: # TD (# H (ru x1) #, # H (id x2)) =
(pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
  (I_posttensor TC I x1, x2)
· # (TC ∙ H) (ru x1 #, id x2)
· pr1
    (pr2
       (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (x1, x2))
# TD
  (LiftPreservesPostTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I x1
  #, # H (id x2)) · # TD (# H (ru x1) #, # H (id x2)) =
?b

?b =

· # H (α ((x1, I), x2))
· nat_z_iso_inv

· # TD
    ((id H x1
     #, LiftPreservesPretensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I

H: C ⟶ D

TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C

  (I_posttensor TC I x1, x2)
· # (TC ∙ H) (ru x1 #, id x2)
· pr1
    (pr2
       (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (x1, x2))
# TD
  (LiftPreservesPostTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I x1
  #, # H (id x2))
· ((pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
     (I_posttensor TC I x1, x2)

       (pr2

          (x1, x2))) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC ((x1, I), x2)
· # H (α ((x1, I), x2))
· nat_z_iso_inv

    ((x1, I), x2)
· # TD
    ((id H x1
     #, LiftPreservesPretensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
          x2) · (id H x1 #, # H (lu x2)))

(pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
  (I_posttensor TC I x1, x2)
· # (TC ∙ H) (ru x1 #, id x2) = ?y'

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC

pent: pentagon_eq TC α

  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
# (TC ∙ H) (ru x1 #, id x2) = ?t2

      exact (maponpaths #H (tri x1 x2)).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
# TD
  (LiftPreservesPostTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I x1
  #, # H (id x2))
· ((pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
     (I_posttensor TC I x1, x2)
   · # H
       (pr1 α ((x1, I), x2)
        · # TC (id x1 #, pr1 lu x2))
   · pr1
       (pr2
          (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
          (x1, x2))) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC ((x1, I), x2)
· # H (α ((x1, I), x2))
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    ((x1, I), x2)
· # TD
    ((id H x1
     #, LiftPreservesPretensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
          x2) · (id H x1 #, # H (lu x2)))

H_ff: fully_faithful H

  (H I)

x1, x2: C
p0: # TD
  (LiftPreservesPostTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
     x1 #, # H (id x2))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (I_posttensor TC I x1, x2) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
  ((x1, I), x2)
# TD
  (LiftPreservesPostTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I x1
  #, # H (id x2))
· ((pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
     (I_posttensor TC I x1, x2)
   · (# H (pr1 α ((x1, I), x2))
      · # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 lu x2)))
   · pr1
       (pr2
          (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
          (x1, x2))) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC ((x1, I), x2)
· # H (α ((x1, I), x2))
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    ((x1, I), x2)
· # TD
    ((id H x1
     #, LiftPreservesPretensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
          x2) · (id H x1 #, # H (lu x2)))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
# TD
  (LiftPreservesPostTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I x1
  #, # H (id x2))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (I_posttensor TC I x1, x2) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC ((x1, I), x2)

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C

ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α

ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC ((x1, I), x2) =
# TD
  (LiftPreservesPostTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I x1
  #, # H (id x2))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (I_posttensor TC I x1, x2)

H: C ⟶ D

  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (x1, I)

· TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
    (TC (x1, I), x2) =
# TD
  (LiftPreservesPostTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I x1
  #, # H (id x2))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (I_posttensor TC I x1, x2)

H: C ⟶ D

I: C

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (x1, I)
  #, id H x2) =
# TD
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso H
        (tensor_after_pair_with_object_right
           (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
           (H I)))
     (nat_z_iso_comp
        (nat_z_iso_comp
           (nat_z_iso_comp
              (nat_z_iso_comp
                 (nat_z_iso_functor_comp_assoc H
                    (pair_with_object_right (H I))
                    (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC))
                 (nat_z_iso_comp
                    (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
                       (PairingWithObjectCommutesRight
                          H I)
                       (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                          H_ff TC))
                    (nat_z_iso_inv
                       (nat_z_iso_functor_comp_assoc
                          (pair_with_object_right I)
                          (pair_functor H H)
                          (TransportedTensor Duniv
                             H_eso H_ff TC)))))
              (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso
                 (pair_with_object_right I)
                 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                    H_ff TC)))
           (nat_z_iso_functor_comp_assoc
              (pair_with_object_right I) TC H))
        (nat_z_iso_inv
           (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
              (tensor_after_pair_with_object_right TC
                 I) H))) x1 #, # H (id x2))

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
(TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (x1, I)
#, id H x2) =
(nat_z_iso_comp
   (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso H
      (tensor_after_pair_with_object_right
         (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) (H I)))
   (nat_z_iso_comp
      (nat_z_iso_comp
         (nat_z_iso_comp
            (nat_z_iso_comp
               (nat_z_iso_functor_comp_assoc H
                  (pair_with_object_right (H I))
                  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                     TC))
               (nat_z_iso_comp
                  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
                     (PairingWithObjectCommutesRight H
                        I)
                     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                        H_ff TC))
                  (nat_z_iso_inv
                     (nat_z_iso_functor_comp_assoc
                        (pair_with_object_right I)
                        (pair_functor H H)
                        (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                           H_ff TC)))))
            (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso
               (pair_with_object_right I)
               (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                  TC)))
         (nat_z_iso_functor_comp_assoc
            (pair_with_object_right I) TC H))
      (nat_z_iso_inv
         (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
            (tensor_after_pair_with_object_right TC I)
            H))) x1 #, id H x2)

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I

α: associator TC

pent: pentagon_eq TC α

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (x1, I) =
nat_z_iso_comp
  (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso H
     (tensor_after_pair_with_object_right
        (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) (H I)))
  (nat_z_iso_comp

              (nat_z_iso_functor_comp_assoc H

                 (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                    TC))
              (nat_z_iso_comp

                    (PairingWithObjectCommutesRight H
                       I)
                    (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC))
                 (nat_z_iso_inv
                    (nat_z_iso_functor_comp_assoc
                       (pair_with_object_right I)
                       (pair_functor H H)
                       (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                          H_ff TC)))))
           (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso
              (pair_with_object_right I)
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                 TC)))
        (nat_z_iso_functor_comp_assoc
           (pair_with_object_right I) TC H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
           (tensor_after_pair_with_object_right TC I)
           H))) x1

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
lift_functor_along_comm (D,, Duniv) (pair_functor H H)
  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff) (TC ∙ H) (x1, I) =
nat_z_iso_comp
  (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso H
     (tensor_after_pair_with_object_right
        (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) (H I)))
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp
        (nat_z_iso_comp
           (nat_z_iso_comp
              (nat_z_iso_functor_comp_assoc H
                 (pair_with_object_right (H I))
                 (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                    TC))
              (nat_z_iso_comp
                 (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
                    (PairingWithObjectCommutesRight H
                       I)
                    (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC))
                 (nat_z_iso_inv
                    (nat_z_iso_functor_comp_assoc
                       (pair_with_object_right I)
                       (pair_functor H H)
                       (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                          H_ff TC)))))
           (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso
              (pair_with_object_right I)
              (lift_functor_along_comm (D,, Duniv)
                 (pair_functor H H)
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
                 (TC ∙ H))))
        (nat_z_iso_functor_comp_assoc
           (pair_with_object_right I) TC H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
           (tensor_after_pair_with_object_right TC I)
           H))) x1

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
     (pair_functor H H))
  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
     [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (is_univalent_functor_category
        (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
        (pair_functor H H))
     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv (pair_functor H H)
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
  (x1, I) =
id functor_fix_snd_arg_ob D D D
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) (H I)
     (pr1 H x1)
· (id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (H x1, H I)
   · (# (pr1 (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
        (id (H x1, H I))
      · id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
             (H x1, H I))
   · pr1
       (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             (pair_functor H H))
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                (pair_functor H H)
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H)) (x1, I) · id H (TC (x1, I))
   · # H (id TC (x1, I)))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I

α: associator TC

pent: pentagon_eq TC α

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
     (pair_functor H H))
  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
     [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]

     (is_univalent_functor_category
        (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
        (pair_functor H H))
     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv (pair_functor H H)
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
  (x1, I) =
# (pr1 (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
  (id (H x1, H I))
· id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (H x1, H I)
· pr1
    (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
          (pair_functor H H))
       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
          [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (is_univalent_functor_category
             (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             (pair_functor H H))
          (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
             (pair_functor H H)
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
       (TC ∙ H)) (x1, I) · id H (TC (x1, I))
· # H (id TC (x1, I))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
     (pair_functor H H))
  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
     [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (is_univalent_functor_category
        (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
        (pair_functor H H))
     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv (pair_functor H H)
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
  (x1, I) =
# (pr1 (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
  (id (H x1, H I))
· pr1
    (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
          (pair_functor H H))
       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
          [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (is_univalent_functor_category
             (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             (pair_functor H H))
          (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
             (pair_functor H H)
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
       (TC ∙ H)) (x1, I) · # H (id TC (x1, I))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C

α: associator TC

pent: pentagon_eq TC α

ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
     (pair_functor H H))
  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
     [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (is_univalent_functor_category
        (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
        (pair_functor H H))
     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv (pair_functor H H)
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
  (x1, I) =
id lift_functor_along (D,, Duniv) (pair_functor H H)
     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff) (TC ∙ H)
     (H x1, H I)
· pr1
    (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
          (pair_functor H H))
       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
          [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (is_univalent_functor_category
             (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             (pair_functor H H))
          (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
             (pair_functor H H)
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
       (TC ∙ H)) (x1, I) · # H (id TC (x1, I))

· pr1

       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]

          (pair_functor H H))

          [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
     (pair_functor H H))
  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
     [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (is_univalent_functor_category
        (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
        (pair_functor H H))
     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv (pair_functor H H)
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
  (x1, I) =
id lift_functor_along (D,, Duniv) (pair_functor H H)
     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff) (TC ∙ H)
     (H x1, H I)
· pr1
    (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
          (pair_functor H H))
       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
          [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (is_univalent_functor_category
             (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             (pair_functor H H))
          (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
             (pair_functor H H)
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
       (TC ∙ H)) (x1, I)

      apply (! id_left _).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
p0: # TD
  (LiftPreservesPostTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
     x1 #, # H (id x2))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (I_posttensor TC I x1, x2) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
  ((x1, I), x2)
# TD
  (LiftPreservesPostTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I x1
  #, # H (id x2))
· ((pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
     (I_posttensor TC I x1, x2)
   · (# H (pr1 α ((x1, I), x2))
      · # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 lu x2)))
   · pr1
       (pr2
          (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
          (x1, x2))) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC ((x1, I), x2)
· # H (α ((x1, I), x2))
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    ((x1, I), x2)
· # TD
    ((id H x1
     #, LiftPreservesPretensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
          x2) · (id H x1 #, # H (lu x2)))


    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
p0: # TD
  (LiftPreservesPostTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
     x1 #, # H (id x2))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (I_posttensor TC I x1, x2) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
  ((x1, I), x2)
# TD
  (LiftPreservesPostTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I x1
  #, # H (id x2))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (I_posttensor TC I x1, x2)
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, I), x2))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 lu x2))
· pr1
    (pr2 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (x1, x2)) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC ((x1, I), x2)
· # H (α ((x1, I), x2))
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    ((x1, I), x2)
· # TD
    ((id H x1
     #, LiftPreservesPretensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
          x2) · (id H x1 #, # H (lu x2)))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
p0: # TD
  (LiftPreservesPostTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
     x1 #, # H (id x2))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (I_posttensor TC I x1, x2) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
  ((x1, I), x2)
# TD
  (LiftPreservesPostTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I x1
  #, # H (id x2))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (I_posttensor TC I x1, x2)
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, I), x2))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 lu x2))
· pr1
    (pr2 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (x1, x2)) = ?b
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator

x1, x2: C
p0: # TD
  (LiftPreservesPostTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
     x1 #, # H (id x2))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (I_posttensor TC I x1, x2) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
  ((x1, I), x2)
?b =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC ((x1, I), x2)
· # H (α ((x1, I), x2))
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    ((x1, I), x2)
· # TD
    ((id H x1
     #, LiftPreservesPretensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
          x2) · (id H x1 #, # H (lu x2)))

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
p0: # TD
  (LiftPreservesPostTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
     x1 #, # H (id x2))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (I_posttensor TC I x1, x2) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
  ((x1, I), x2)
# TD
  (LiftPreservesPostTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I x1
  #, # H (id x2))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (I_posttensor TC I x1, x2) = ?y'

      exact p0.
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
p0: # TD
  (LiftPreservesPostTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
     x1 #, # H (id x2))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (I_posttensor TC I x1, x2) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
  ((x1, I), x2)
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC ((x1, I), x2)
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, I), x2))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 lu x2))
· pr1
    (pr2 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (x1, x2)) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC ((x1, I), x2)
· # H (α ((x1, I), x2))
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    ((x1, I), x2)
· # TD
    ((id H x1
     #, LiftPreservesPretensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
          x2) · (id H x1 #, # H (lu x2)))

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
id functor_fix_fst_arg_ob D D D
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) (H I)
     (pr1 H x2)
· (id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (H I, H x2)
   · (# (pr1 (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
        (id (H I, H x2))
      · id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
             (H I, H x2))
   · pr1
       (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             (pair_functor H H))
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                (pair_functor H H)
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H)) (I, x2) · id H (TC (I, x2))
   · # H (id TC (I, x2))) =
rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
     (pair_functor H H))
  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
     [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (is_univalent_functor_category
        (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
        (pair_functor H H))
     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv (pair_functor H H)
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
  (I, x2)

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

α: associator TC

pent: pentagon_eq TC α

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

id functor_fix_fst_arg_ob D D D
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) (H I)
     (pr1 H x2)
· (id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (H I, H x2)
   · (# (pr1 (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
        (id (H I, H x2))

             (H I, H x2))
   · pr1
       (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             (pair_functor H H))

             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]

                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D

                D (pair_functor H H))
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                (pair_functor H H)

                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H)) (I, x2) · id H (TC (I, x2))
   · id H (TC (I, x2))) =
rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
     (pair_functor H H))

        (pair_functor H H))

        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)

        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))

        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv (pair_functor H H)

        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
p0: LiftPreservesPretensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I x2 =
TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (I, x2)
(pr11 (nat_z_iso_inv
         (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)))
  (x1, I_pretensor TC I x2) =
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  ((x1, I), x2)
· # TD
    (# H (id x1)
    #, LiftPreservesPretensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I x2)

H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
p0: LiftPreservesPretensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I x2 =
TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (I, x2)
(pr11 (nat_z_iso_inv
         (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)))
  (x1, I_pretensor TC I x2) =
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  ((x1, I), x2)
· # TD
    (# H (id x1)
    #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
         (I, x2))

x1, x2: C
i:= pr2
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
  ((x1, I), x2): is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1
     (nat_z_iso_inv
        (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
     ((x1, I), x2))
(pr11 (nat_z_iso_inv

  (x1, I_pretensor TC I x2) =
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  ((x1, I), x2)
· # TD
    (# H (id x1)
    #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
         (I, x2))

· (pr11 (nat_z_iso_inv

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D

H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2: C
i:= pr2
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
  ((x1, I), x2): is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1
     (nat_z_iso_inv
        (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
     ((x1, I), x2))
j:= pr2
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
  (x1, I_pretensor TC I x2): is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1
     (nat_z_iso_inv
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
     (x1, I_pretensor TC I x2))
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr1
     (nat_z_iso_inv
        (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
     ((x1, I), x2),, i) =
# TD
  (# H (id x1)
  #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (I, x2))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr1
       (nat_z_iso_inv
          (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
       (x1, I_pretensor TC I x2),, j)


    exact (TransportedAssocRightOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 I x2).
  Qed.

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
y1, y2, y3, y4: D
pr1 αD ((TD (y1, y2), y3), y4)
· pr1 αD ((y1, y2), TD (y3, y4)) =
# TD (pr1 αD ((y1, y2), y3) #, id y4)
· pr1 αD ((y1, TD (y2, y3)), y4)
· # TD (id y1 #, pr1 αD ((y2, y3), y4))

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D

H_ff: fully_faithful H

ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
y1, y2, y3, y4: D
isaprop
  (pr1 αD ((TD (y1, y2), y3), y4)
   · pr1 αD ((y1, y2), TD (y3, y4)) =
   # TD (pr1 αD ((y1, y2), y3) #, id y4)
   · pr1 αD ((y1, TD (y2, y3)), y4)
   · # TD (id y1 #, pr1 αD ((y2, y3), y4)))

→ pr1 αD ((TD (y1, y2), y3), y4)

  · pr1 αD ((y1, TD (y2, y3)), y4)
  · # TD (id y1 #, pr1 αD ((y2, y3), y4))

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
y1, y2, y3, y4: D
isaprop
  (pr1 αD ((TD (y1, y2), y3), y4)
   · pr1 αD ((y1, y2), TD (y3, y4)) =
   # TD (pr1 αD ((y1, y2), y3) #, id y4)
   · pr1 αD ((y1, TD (y2, y3)), y4)

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I

pent: pentagon_eq TC α

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
y1, y2, y3, y4: D
(∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) y1)
→ pr1 αD ((TD (y1, y2), y3), y4)
  · pr1 αD ((y1, y2), TD (y3, y4)) =
  # TD (pr1 αD ((y1, y2), y3) #, id y4)
  · pr1 αD ((y1, TD (y2, y3)), y4)
  · # TD (id y1 #, pr1 αD ((y2, y3), y4))

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

∃ a : C, z_iso (H a) y1

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

   · pr1 αD ((y1, TD (y2, y3)), y4)
   · # TD (id y1 #, pr1 αD ((y2, y3), y4)))
 apply homset_property.

I: C

α: associator TC

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
y1, y2, y3, y4: D
(∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) y1)
→ pr1 αD ((TD (y1, y2), y3), y4)
  · pr1 αD ((y1, y2), TD (y3, y4)) =
  # TD (pr1 αD ((y1, y2), y3) #, id y4)
  · pr1 αD ((y1, TD (y2, y3)), y4)
  · # TD (id y1 #, pr1 αD ((y2, y3), y4))
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
y1, y2, y3, y4: D
∃ a : C, z_iso (H a) y1

tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
y3, y4: D
x1, x2: C
pr1 αD ((TD (H x1, H x2), y3), y4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), TD (y3, y4)) =
# TD (pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), y3) #, id y4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, y3)), y4)
· # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 αD ((H x2, y3), y4))


    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
y3, y4: D
x1, x2: C
UU

TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
y4: D
x1, x2, x3: C
UU
 exact (∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) y4). 
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
y4: D
x1, x2, x3: C
isaprop
  (pr1 αD ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), y4)
   · pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, y4)) =
   # TD (pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), H x3) #, id y4)
   · pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), y4)
   · # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 αD ((H x2, H x3), y4)))
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
y4: D
x1, x2, x3: C
(∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) y4)
→ pr1 αD ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), y4)
  · pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, y4)) =
  # TD (pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), H x3) #, id y4)
  · pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), y4)
  · # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 αD ((H x2, H x3), y4))

TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C

  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator

y4: D
x1, x2, x3: C
isaprop
  (pr1 αD ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), y4)
   · pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, y4)) =
   # TD (pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), H x3) #, id y4)
   · pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), y4)
   · # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 αD ((H x2, H x3), y4)))
 apply homset_property.

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
y4: D
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
xx4: z_iso (H x4) y4
pr1 αD ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), y4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, y4)) =
# TD (pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), H x3) #, id y4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), y4)

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
xx4: z_iso (H x4) (H x4)
pr1 αD ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4)) =
# TD (pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), H x3) #, id H x4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4)
· # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 αD ((H x2, H x3), H x4))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
