  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pr1 αD ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4)) =
# TD (pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), H x3) #, id H x4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4)
· # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 αD ((H x2, H x3), H x4))


    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH:= maponpaths # H (pent x1 x2 x3 x4): # H
  (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)
   · pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H
  (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4)
   · pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)
   · # TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
pr1 αD ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4)) =
# TD (pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), H x3) #, id H x4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4)
· # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 αD ((H x2, H x3), H x4))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
pr1 αD ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4)) =
# TD (pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), H x3) #, id H x4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4)
· # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 αD ((H x2, H x3), H x4))


    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
pr1 αD ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4)) =
# TD (pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), H x3) #, id H x4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4)
· # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 αD ((H x2, H x3), H x4))


    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
pr1 αD ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4)) = ?b
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?b =
# TD (pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), H x3) #, id H x4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4)
· # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 αD ((H x2, H x3), H x4))
 
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
pr1 αD ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4)) = ?b

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α

ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4)) = ?t2

      apply TransportedAssociator_tensor_r_on_ob.

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D

pent: pentagon_eq TC α

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
pr1 αD ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4)
· (assoc_left_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
   · # H (α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
   · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
       x4) =
# TD (pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), H x3) #, id H x4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4)
· # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 αD ((H x2, H x3), H x4))

· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =

· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))

  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =

· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
pr1 αD ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4)
· (assoc_left_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
   · # H (α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
   · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
       x4) = ?b

H: C ⟶ D

I: C

pent: pentagon_eq TC α

ID:= H I: D

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?b =
# TD (pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), H x3) #, id H x4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4)
· # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 αD ((H x2, H x3), H x4))

H: C ⟶ D

  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =

· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
assoc_left_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· # H (α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· assoc_right_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· (assoc_left_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
   · # H (α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
   · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
       x4) =
# TD (pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), H x3) #, id H x4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4)
· # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 αD ((H x2, H x3), H x4))

H: C ⟶ D

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =

· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))

TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
assoc_right_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· assoc_left_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4 =
id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α

ID:= H I: D

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
p0: assoc_right_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
  x4
· assoc_left_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2
    x3 x4 =
id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
assoc_left_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· # H (α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· assoc_right_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· (assoc_left_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
   · # H (α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
   · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
       x4) =
# TD (pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), H x3) #, id H x4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4)
· # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 αD ((H x2, H x3), H x4))

assoc_right_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· assoc_left_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4 =
id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D

H_ff: fully_faithful H

I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)

pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =

· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
pr1
  (pr2 (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    (nat_z_iso_inv
       (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (x1, x2)
    #, id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
            (pr2
               (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                  ((TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                      TC (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4))))
· (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
           (pr1
              (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H
                 ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))))
     #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
          (x3, x4))
   · (pr11 (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
       ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
pr1
  (pr2 (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    (nat_z_iso_inv
       (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (x1, x2)
    #, id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
            (pr2
               (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                  ((TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                      TC (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4))))
· # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    (id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
          (pr1
             (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H
                ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))))
    #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
         (x3, x4))
· (pr11 (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)) =
id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))

· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))

pr1

             (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H
                ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))))
    #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
         (x3, x4))
· (pr11 (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)) = ?b
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?b = id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))

H: C ⟶ D

  (H I)

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =

· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
pr1
  (pr2 (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    (nat_z_iso_inv
       (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (x1, x2)

            (pr2
               (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D

    (id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
          (pr1
             (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H
                ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))))
    #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
         (x3, x4)) = ?y'

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D

· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
pr1
  (pr2 (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

             (pr1
                (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H
                   ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))))
       #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
            (x3, x4))) = ?y'

H: C ⟶ D

  (H I)

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C

· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (x1, x2)
  #, id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
          (pr2
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                ((TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                    TC (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4))))
· # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    (id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
          (pr1
             (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H
                ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))))
    #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
         (x3, x4)) = ?t2

        apply (! functor_comp TD _ _).

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D

H_ff: fully_faithful H

    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
pr1
  (pr2 (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # TD
    ((nat_z_iso_inv
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

     · (id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC

                (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H
                   ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))))
       #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
            (x3, x4)))
· (pr11 (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)) =
id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?b = id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
 
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
pr1
  (pr2 (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # TD
    ((nat_z_iso_inv
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
        (x1, x2)
     #, id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
             (pr2
                (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                   ((TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC (H x1, H x2), H x3),
                   H x4))))
     · (id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
             (pr1
                (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H
                   ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))))
       #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
            (x3, x4)))
· (pr11 (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)) = ?b

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
pr1
  (pr2 (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # TD
    ((nat_z_iso_inv
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
        (x1, x2)
     #, id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
             (pr2
                (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                   ((TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC (H x1, H x2), H x3),
                   H x4))))
     · (id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
             (pr1
                (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H
                   ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))))
       #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
            (x3, x4))) = ?y'

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
(nat_z_iso_inv
   (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
   (x1, x2)
#, id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (pr2
           (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
              ((TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
                  (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4))))
· (id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (pr1
           (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H
              ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))))
  #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (x3, x4)) = ?t2

        apply (! binprod_comp _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _).

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
pr1
  (pr2 (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # TD
    (nat_z_iso_inv
       (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (x1, x2)
     · id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
            (pr1
               (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H
                  ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))))
    #, id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
            (pr2
               (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                  ((TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                      TC (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4)))
       · TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
           (x3, x4))
· (pr11 (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)) =
id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))

    ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)) = ?b

    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
pr1
  (pr2 (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # TD
    (nat_z_iso_inv
       (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

     · id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC

· (pr11 (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))

(nat_z_iso_inv

pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
(nat_z_iso_inv
   (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
   (x1, x2)
#, id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (pr2
           (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
              ((TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
                  (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4)))
   · TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (x3, x4)) = ?t2

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
(nat_z_iso_inv
   (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
   (x1, x2)
#, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (x3, x4)) =
?t2

        apply idpath.
      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
pr1
  (pr2 (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # TD
    (nat_z_iso_inv
       (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (x1, x2)
    #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
         (x3, x4))
· (pr11 (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)) =
id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))

pr1

     ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # TD
    (nat_z_iso_inv
       (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?b = id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))

x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =

· # H (α x)

    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
pr1
  (pr2 (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)) = ?y'

        exact (TransportedAssocRightInvOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (TC (x1,x2)) x3 x4).
      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC (x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))
· # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    (# H (id TC (x1, x2))
    #, nat_z_iso_inv
         (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
         (x3, x4))
· # TD
    (nat_z_iso_inv
       (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (x1, x2)
    #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
         (x3, x4))
· (pr11 (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)) =
id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))

  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
(pr11 (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
  ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)) = ?t2

        exact (TransportedAssocLeftOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 (TC (x3,x4))).
      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC (x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))
· # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    (# H (id TC (x1, x2))
    #, nat_z_iso_inv
         (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
         (x3, x4))
· # TD
    (nat_z_iso_inv
       (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (x1, x2)
    #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
         (x3, x4))
· (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (x1, x2) #, id H (TC (x3, x4)))
   · TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (TC (x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))

        (x1, x2) #, id H (TC (x3, x4)))
   · TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (TC (x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) = ?b

· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))

TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
(# H (id TC (x1, x2))
#, nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (x3, x4))
· (nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (x1, x2)
  #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (x3, x4)) = ?t2


        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
(# H (id TC (x1, x2))
#, nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (x3, x4))
· (nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (x1, x2)
  #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (x3, x4)) = ?b

· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =

· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))

tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,

  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =

?b = ?t2

       (x3, x4)) = ?t2

pent: pentagon_eq TC α

ID:= H I: D

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =

· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))

TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =

· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) (x3, x4)
· TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (x3, x4) =
?t2

        apply (pr2 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)).
      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC (x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))
· # TD
    (nat_z_iso_inv
       (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (x1, x2) #, id (TC ∙ H) (x3, x4))
· (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (x1, x2) #, id H (TC (x3, x4)))
   · TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (TC (x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))

H: C ⟶ D

H_ff: fully_faithful H

I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC

pent: pentagon_eq TC α

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

x1, x2, x3, x4: C

· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =

· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?b = id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))

I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC (x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))
· # TD
    (nat_z_iso_inv
       (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (x1, x2) #, id (TC ∙ H) (x3, x4))
· # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (x1, x2) #, id H (TC (x3, x4))) = ?y'

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC (x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))
· (# TD
     (nat_z_iso_inv
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
        (x1, x2) #, id (TC ∙ H) (x3, x4))
   · # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
          (x1, x2) #, id H (TC (x3, x4)))) = ?y'

    x
(nat_z_iso_inv
   (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
   (x1, x2)
 · TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (x1, x2)
#, id (TC ∙ H) (x3, x4) · id H (TC (x3, x4))) = ?t2

  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =

    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
(nat_z_iso_inv
   (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
   (x1, x2)
 · TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (x1, x2)
#, id (TC ∙ H) (x3, x4)) = ?t2

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α

ID:= H I: D

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) (x1, x2)
· TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (x1, x2) =
?y'

        apply (pr2 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)).
      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC (x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))
· # TD (id (TC ∙ H) (x1, x2) #, id (TC ∙ H) (x3, x4))
· TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
    (TC (x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)) =
id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC (x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))
· # TD (id ((TC ∙ H) (x1, x2), (TC ∙ H) (x3, x4)))
· TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
    (TC (x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)) =
id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC (x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))
· id TD ((TC ∙ H) (x1, x2), (TC ∙ H) (x3, x4))
· TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
    (TC (x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)) =
id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC (x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))
· TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
    (TC (x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)) =
id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))

      apply (pr2 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
p0: assoc_right_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
  x4
· assoc_left_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2
    x3 x4 =
id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
assoc_left_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· # H (α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· assoc_right_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· (assoc_left_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
   · # H (α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
   · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
       x4) =
# TD (pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), H x3) #, id H x4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4)
· # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 αD ((H x2, H x3), H x4))


    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
p0: assoc_right_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
  x4
· assoc_left_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2
    x3 x4 =
id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
assoc_left_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· # H (α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· assoc_right_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· (assoc_left_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
   · # H (α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
   · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
       x4) = ?b
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
p0: assoc_right_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
  x4
· assoc_left_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2
    x3 x4 =
id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
?b =
# TD (pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), H x3) #, id H x4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4)
· # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 αD ((H x2, H x3), H x4))
 
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
p0: assoc_right_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
  x4
· assoc_left_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2
    x3 x4 =
id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
assoc_left_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· # H (α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· assoc_right_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· (assoc_left_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
   · # H (α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
   · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
       x4) = ?b

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α

ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
p0: assoc_right_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
  x4
· assoc_left_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2
    x3 x4 =
id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
assoc_left_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· # H (α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· (assoc_right_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
     x4
   · (assoc_left_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
        x4 · # H (α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
      · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2
          x3 x4)) = ?b

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
p0: assoc_right_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
  x4
· assoc_left_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2
    x3 x4 =
id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
assoc_right_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· (assoc_left_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
   · # H (α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
   · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
       x4) = ?t2

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
p0: assoc_right_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
  x4
· assoc_left_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2
    x3 x4 =
id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
assoc_right_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· assoc_left_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· # H (α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
· assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4 =
?t2

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
p0: assoc_right_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
  x4
· assoc_left_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2
    x3 x4 =
id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
assoc_right_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· assoc_left_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4 =
?y'

      exact p0.
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
p0: assoc_right_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
  x4
· assoc_left_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2
    x3 x4 =
id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
assoc_left_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· # H (α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· (id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
   · # H (α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
   · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
       x4) =
# TD (pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), H x3) #, id H x4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4)
· # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 αD ((H x2, H x3), H x4))

H: C ⟶ D

· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))

  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =

· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv

    x
assoc_left_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· # H (α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· (id H (assoc_right TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))

· pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4)
· # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 αD ((H x2, H x3), H x4))

x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =

· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))

tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
assoc_left_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· # H (α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· (# H (α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
   · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
       x4) = ?b
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?b =
# TD (pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), H x3) #, id H x4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4)
· # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 αD ((H x2, H x3), H x4))

TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# H (α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) = ?t2

      exact pentH.
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
assoc_left_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· (# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
   · # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
   · # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4))))
· assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4 =
# TD (pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), H x3) #, id H x4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4)
· # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 αD ((H x2, H x3), H x4))


    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC

pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
assoc_left_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· (# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
   · # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
   · # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4))))
· assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4 =
?b
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?b =
# TD (pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), H x3) #, id H x4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4)
· # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 αD ((H x2, H x3), H x4))

· # H (α x)

· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =

TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?t1 = (pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), H x3) #, id H x4)

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?y = pr1 αD ((H x1, H x2), H x3)

      exact (! tαD ((x1,x2),x3)).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
assoc_left_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· (# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
   · # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
   · # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4))))
· assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4 =
# TD
  (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     ((x1, x2), x3) · # H (α ((x1, x2), x3))
   · nat_z_iso_inv
       (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       ((x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4)
· # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 αD ((H x2, H x3), H x4))


    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I

α: associator TC

pent: pentagon_eq TC α

luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
