pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
assoc_left_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· (# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
   · # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
   · # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4))))
· assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4 =
?b
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?b =
# TD
  (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     ((x1, x2), x3) · # H (α ((x1, x2), x3))
   · nat_z_iso_inv
       (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       ((x1, x2), x3) #, id 
  H x4) · pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4)
· # TD (id H x1 #, pr1 αD ((H x2, H x3), H x4))

tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α

luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?t1 = pr1 αD ((H x2, H x3), H x4)

      exact (! tαD ((x2,x3),x4)).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
assoc_left_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· (# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
   · # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
   · # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4))))
· assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4 =
# TD
  (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     ((x1, x2), x3) · # H (α ((x1, x2), x3))
   · nat_z_iso_inv
       (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       ((x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4)
· pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4)
· # TD
    (id H x1
    #, TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
         ((x2, x3), x4) · # H (α ((x2, x3), x4))
       · nat_z_iso_inv
           (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
           ((x2, x3), x4))

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I

pent: pentagon_eq TC α

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)

x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
assoc_left_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· (# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
   · # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
   · # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4))))
· assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4 =
?b
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?b =
# TD
  (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     ((x1, x2), x3) · # H (α ((x1, x2), x3))
   · nat_z_iso_inv
       (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       ((x1, x2), x3) #, id 
  H x4) · pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4)
· # TD
    (id H x1
    #, TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
         ((x2, x3), x4) · 
       # H (α ((x2, x3), x4))
       · nat_z_iso_inv
           (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
           ((x2, x3), x4))

x1, x2, x3, x4: C

· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =

    x
?t1 = pr1 αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4)

      exact (! TransportedAssociator_tensor_m_on_ob _ _ _ _ _ x1 x2 x3 x4).

· (# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))

?b =
# TD
  (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     ((x1, x2), x3) · # H (α ((x1, x2), x3))
   · nat_z_iso_inv
       (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       ((x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4)
· (assoc_left_tensor_m Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
   · # H (α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
   · assoc_right_tensor_m Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
       x4)
· # TD
    (id H x1
    #, TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
         ((x2, x3), x4) · # H (α ((x2, x3), x4))
       · nat_z_iso_inv
           (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
           ((x2, x3), x4))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?y =
# TD
  (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     ((x1, x2), x3) · # H (α ((x1, x2), x3))
   · nat_z_iso_inv
       (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       ((x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4)
· (assoc_left_tensor_m Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
   · # H (α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
   · assoc_right_tensor_m Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
       x4)

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α

ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?y =
# TD
  (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     ((x1, x2), x3) · # H (α ((x1, x2), x3))
   · nat_z_iso_inv
       (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       ((x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4 · id H x4)
· (assoc_left_tensor_m Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
   · # H (α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
   · assoc_right_tensor_m Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
       x4)

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?y =
# TD
  (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     ((x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4)
· # TD (# H (α ((x1, x2), x3)) #, id H x4)
· # TD
    (nat_z_iso_inv
       (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       ((x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4)
· assoc_left_tensor_m Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· # H (α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?y =
# TD
  (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     ((x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4)
· # TD (# H (α ((x1, x2), x3)) #, id H x4)
· # TD
    (nat_z_iso_inv
       (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       ((x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4)
· assoc_left_tensor_m Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?y =
# TD
  (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     ((x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4)
· # TD (# H (α ((x1, x2), x3)) #, id H x4)
· (# TD
     (nat_z_iso_inv
        (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
        ((x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4)
   · assoc_left_tensor_m Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
       x4)

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?t1 =
# TD
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     ((x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4)
· assoc_left_tensor_m Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4


      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# TD
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     ((x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4)
· assoc_left_tensor_m Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4 =
TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
  (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
p: # TD
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     ((x1, x2), x3) #, id 
  H x4)
· assoc_left_tensor_m Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
    x4 =
TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
  (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)
?t1 =
# TD
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     ((x1, x2), x3) #, id 
  H x4)
· assoc_left_tensor_m Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# TD
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     ((x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4)
· assoc_left_tensor_m Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4 =
TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
  (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# TD
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (x1, TC (x2, x3))
   · # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (# H (id x1)
       #, nat_z_iso_inv
            (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
            (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
· assoc_left_tensor_m Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4 =
TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
  (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# TD
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (x1, TC (x2, x3))
   · # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (# H (id x1)
       #, nat_z_iso_inv
            (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
            (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
· (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
        (id H (pr11 ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
        #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
             (x2, x3))
     #, id functor_identity D
             (pr2
                (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H
                   ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))))
   · (pr11 (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
       ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)) =
TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
  (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# TD
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (x1, TC (x2, x3))
   · # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (# H (id x1)
       #, nat_z_iso_inv
            (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
            (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
· # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (id H (pr11 ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
       #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
            (x2, x3))
    #, id functor_identity D
            (pr2
               (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H
                  ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))))
· (pr11 (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4) =
TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
  (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# TD
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (x1, TC (x2, x3))
   · # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (# H (id x1)
       #, nat_z_iso_inv
            (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
            (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
· # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (id H (pr11 ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
       #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
            (x2, x3))
    #, id functor_identity D
            (pr2
               (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H
                  ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))))
· (pr11 (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4) = ?b
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?b =
TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
  (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)
 
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# TD
  ((nat_z_iso_inv
      (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      (x1, TC (x2, x3))
    · # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
        (# H (id x1)
        #, nat_z_iso_inv
             (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC) (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
   · (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
        (id H (pr11 ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
        #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
             (x2, x3))
     #, id functor_identity D
             (pr2
                (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H
                   ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)))))
· (pr11 (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4) =
TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
  (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# TD
  ((nat_z_iso_inv
      (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      (x1, TC (x2, x3))
    · # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
        (# H (id x1)
        #, nat_z_iso_inv
             (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC) (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
   · (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
        (id H (pr11 ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
        #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
             (x2, x3))
     #, id functor_identity D
             (pr2
                (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H
                   ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)))))
· (pr11 (nat_z_iso_comp
           (nat_z_iso_comp
              (nat_z_iso_functor_comp_assoc
                 (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H)
                 (pair_functor
                    (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC) (functor_identity D))
                 (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                    TC))
              (nat_z_iso_comp
                 (nat_z_iso_comp
                    (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
                       (nat_z_iso_comp
                          (nat_z_iso_comp
                             (pair_functor_composite
                                (pair_functor H H) H
                                (TransportedTensor
                                   Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
                                (functor_identity D))
                             (pair_nat_z_iso
                                (TransportedTensorComm
                                   Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
                                (functor_commutes_with_id
                                   H)))
                          (nat_z_iso_pair TC H
                             (functor_identity C) H))
                       (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                          H_ff TC))
                    (nat_z_iso_inv
                       (nat_z_iso_functor_comp_assoc
                          (pair_functor TC
                             (functor_identity C))
                          (pair_functor H H)
                          (TransportedTensor Duniv
                             H_eso H_ff TC))))
                 (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso
                    (pair_functor TC
                       (functor_identity C))
                    (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC))))
           (nat_z_iso_functor_comp_assoc
              (pair_functor TC (functor_identity C))
              TC H))) ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4) =
TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
  (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)


        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# TD
  ((pr1
      (inv_from_z_iso
         (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
            [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
            (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
               (pair_functor H H))
            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (is_univalent_functor_category
                  (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                  Duniv)
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
               (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                  (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
            (TC ∙ H),,
          pr2
            (rad_eps
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                  [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                  (is_univalent_functor_category
                     (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                     D Duniv)
                  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                     (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                  (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                     (pair_functor H H)
                     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                  (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                     (pair_functor H H)
                     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
               (TC ∙ H)))) (x1, TC (x2, x3))
    · # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
        (# H (id x1)
        #, pr1
             (inv_from_z_iso
                (rad_eps
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                   (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (is_univalent_functor_category
                         (precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D) D Duniv)
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                         (pair_functor H H)
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))
                      (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                         (pair_functor H H)
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))) (TC ∙ H),,
                 pr2
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))))
             (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
   · (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
        (id H x1
        #, rad_eps
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (is_univalent_functor_category
                   (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                   Duniv)
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
             (TC ∙ H) (x2, x3)) #, id H x4))
· (id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
           (H x1, H (TC (x2, x3))), H x4)
   · (# (pr1 (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
        (id (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
               (H x1, H (TC (x2, x3))), H x4)
         · (rad_eps
              [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
              [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
              (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                 D (pair_functor H H))
              (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                 [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                 [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                 (is_univalent_functor_category
                    (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                    D Duniv)
                 (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                    (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                 (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                    (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                    (pair_functor H H)
                    (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                    (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                 (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                    (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                    (pair_functor H H)
                    (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                    (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
              (TC ∙ H) (x1, TC (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
         · (id H (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3))) #, id H x4))
      · id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
             (H (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3))), H x4)
      · pr1
          (rad_eps
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (is_univalent_functor_category
                   (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                   Duniv)
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
             (TC ∙ H)) (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
   · id H (TC (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))) =
rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
     (pair_functor H H))
  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
     [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (is_univalent_functor_category
        (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
        (pair_functor H H))
     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv (pair_functor H H)
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
  (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# TD
  ((pr1
      (inv_from_z_iso
         (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
            [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
            (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
               (pair_functor H H))
            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (is_univalent_functor_category
                  (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                  Duniv)
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
               (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                  (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
            (TC ∙ H),,
          pr2
            (rad_eps
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                  [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                  (is_univalent_functor_category
                     (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                     D Duniv)
                  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                     (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                  (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                     (pair_functor H H)
                     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                  (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                     (pair_functor H H)
                     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
               (TC ∙ H)))) (x1, TC (x2, x3))
    · # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
        (# H (id x1)
        #, pr1
             (inv_from_z_iso
                (rad_eps
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))

                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (is_univalent_functor_category
                         (precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D) D Duniv)
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                         (pair_functor H H)
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))
                      (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                         (pair_functor H H)
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))) (TC ∙ H),,
                 pr2
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))))
             (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
   · (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
        (id H x1
        #, rad_eps
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]

                (is_univalent_functor_category
                   (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                   Duniv)
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))

                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
             (TC ∙ H) (x2, x3)) #, id H x4))
· (id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
           (H x1, H (TC (x2, x3))), H x4)
   · (# (pr1 (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
        (id (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
               (H x1, H (TC (x2, x3))), H x4)
         · (rad_eps
              [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
              [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
              (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)

                    (pair_functor H H)
                    (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                    (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
              (TC ∙ H) (x1, TC (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
         · (id H (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3))) #, id H x4))
      · pr1
          (rad_eps
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (is_univalent_functor_category
                   (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                   Duniv)
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
             (TC ∙ H)) (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))) =
rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
     (pair_functor H H))
  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
     [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (is_univalent_functor_category
        (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
        (pair_functor H H))
     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv (pair_functor H H)
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
  (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# TD
  ((pr1
      (inv_from_z_iso
         (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
            [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
            (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
               (pair_functor H H))
            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (is_univalent_functor_category
                  (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                  Duniv)
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
               (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                  (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
            (TC ∙ H),,
          pr2
            (rad_eps
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                  [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                  (is_univalent_functor_category
                     (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                     D Duniv)
                  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                     (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                  (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                     (pair_functor H H)
                     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                  (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                     (pair_functor H H)
                     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
               (TC ∙ H)))) (x1, TC (x2, x3))
    · # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
        (# H (id x1)
        #, pr1
             (inv_from_z_iso
                (rad_eps
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))

                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                         (pair_functor H H)
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))

                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                         (pair_functor H H)
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff

                 pr2
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))

                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]

                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H

                               H_ff))

                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))))
             (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
   · (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
        (id H x1
        #, rad_eps
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]

                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
             (TC ∙ H) (x2, x3)) #, id H x4))
· id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
          (H x1, H (TC (x2, x3))), H x4)
· # (pr1 (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (id (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
           (H x1, H (TC (x2, x3))), H x4)
     · (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             (pair_functor H H))
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)

          (TC ∙ H) (x1, TC (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
     · (id H (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3))) #, id H x4))
· pr1
    (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D

             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
       (TC ∙ H)) (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4) =
rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
     (pair_functor H H))

        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv (pair_functor H H)
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
  (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# TD
  ((pr1
      (inv_from_z_iso
         (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
            [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
            (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
               (pair_functor H H))

               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]

                  (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D

                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))

                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff

    (id (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC

                (pair_functor H H)

                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H) (x1, TC (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
     · (id H (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3))) #, id H x4))
· pr1
    (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
          (pair_functor H H))
       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
          [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]

             (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)

             (pair_functor H H))

             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))

             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
             (pair_functor H H)

             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
       (TC ∙ H)) (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4) = ?b
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?b =
rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
  (pre_composition_functor 
     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
     [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (is_univalent_functor_category
        (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
     (pre_composition_functor 
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D 
        (pair_functor H H))
     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D 
        (pair_functor H H)
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv 
        (pair_functor H H)
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) 
  (TC ∙ H) (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)

             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
             (pair_functor H H)
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
       (TC ∙ H)) (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4) =
id TD (H (TC (x1, TC (x2,, x3))), H x4)
· rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
    [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
    (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
       (pair_functor H H))
    (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
       [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (is_univalent_functor_category
          (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
          (pair_functor H H))
       (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
          (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
          (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
          (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
       (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
          (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv (pair_functor H H)
          (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
          (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
    (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# TD
  ((pr1
      (inv_from_z_iso
         (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
            [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
            (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
               (pair_functor H H))
            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (is_univalent_functor_category
                  (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                  Duniv)
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
               (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                  (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
            (TC ∙ H),,
          pr2
            (rad_eps
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                  [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                  (is_univalent_functor_category
                     (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                     D Duniv)
                  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                     (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                  (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                     (pair_functor H H)
                     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                  (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                     (pair_functor H H)
                     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
               (TC ∙ H)))) (x1, TC (x2, x3))
    · # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
        (# H (id x1)
        #, pr1
             (inv_from_z_iso
                (rad_eps
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                   (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (is_univalent_functor_category
                         (precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D) D Duniv)
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                         (pair_functor H H)
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))
                      (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                         (pair_functor H H)
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))) (TC ∙ H),,
                 pr2
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))))
             (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
   · (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
        (id H x1
        #, rad_eps
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (is_univalent_functor_category
                   (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                   Duniv)
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
             (TC ∙ H) (x2, x3)) #, id H x4))
· id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
          (H x1, H (TC (x2, x3))), H x4)
· # (pr1 (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (id (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
           (H x1, H (TC (x2, x3))), H x4)
     · (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
