          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             (pair_functor H H))
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                (pair_functor H H)
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H) (x1, TC (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
     · (id H (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3))) #, id H x4)) =
id TD (H (TC (x1, TC (x2,, x3))), H x4)

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# TD
  ((pr1
      (inv_from_z_iso
         (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
            [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
            (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
               (pair_functor H H))
            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (is_univalent_functor_category
                  (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                  Duniv)
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
               (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                  (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
            (TC ∙ H),,
          pr2
            (rad_eps
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                  [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                  (is_univalent_functor_category
                     (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                     D Duniv)
                  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                     (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                  (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                     (pair_functor H H)
                     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                  (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                     (pair_functor H H)
                     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
               (TC ∙ H)))) (x1, TC (x2, x3))
    · # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
        (# H (id x1)
        #, pr1
             (inv_from_z_iso
                (rad_eps
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                   (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (is_univalent_functor_category
                         (precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D) D Duniv)
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                         (pair_functor H H)
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))
                      (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                         (pair_functor H H)
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))) (TC ∙ H),,
                 pr2
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))))
             (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
   · (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
        (id H x1
        #, rad_eps
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (is_univalent_functor_category
                   (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                   Duniv)
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
             (TC ∙ H) (x2, x3)) #, id H x4))
· # (pr1 (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (id (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
           (H x1, H (TC (x2, x3))), H x4)
     · (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             (pair_functor H H))
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                (pair_functor H H)
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H) (x1, TC (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
     · (id H (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3))) #, id H x4)) =
id TD (H (TC (x1, TC (x2,, x3))), H x4)

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# TD
  ((pr1
      (inv_from_z_iso
         (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
            [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
            (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
               (pair_functor H H))
            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (is_univalent_functor_category
                  (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                  Duniv)
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
               (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                  (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
            (TC ∙ H),,
          pr2
            (rad_eps
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                  [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                  (is_univalent_functor_category
                     (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                     D Duniv)
                  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                     (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                  (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                     (pair_functor H H)
                     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                  (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                     (pair_functor H H)
                     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
               (TC ∙ H)))) (x1, TC (x2, x3))
    · # TD
        (# H (id x1)
        #, pr1
             (inv_from_z_iso
                (rad_eps
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                   (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (is_univalent_functor_category
                         (precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D) D Duniv)
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                         (pair_functor H H)
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))
                      (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                         (pair_functor H H)
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))) (TC ∙ H),,
                 pr2
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))))
             (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
   · (# TD
        (id H x1
        #, rad_eps
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (is_univalent_functor_category
                   (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                   Duniv)
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
             (TC ∙ H) (x2, x3)) #, id H x4))
· # (pr1 TD)
    (id (TD (H x1, H (TC (x2, x3))), H x4)
     · (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             (pair_functor H H))
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                (pair_functor H H)
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H) (x1, TC (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
     · (id H (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3))) #, id H x4)) =
id TD (H (TC (x1, TC (x2,, x3))), H x4)

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
ptH:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (pair_functor H H
   ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
# TD
  ((pr1
      (inv_from_z_iso
         (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
            [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
            (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
               (pair_functor H H))
            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (is_univalent_functor_category
                  (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                  Duniv)
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
               (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                  (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
            (TC ∙ H),,
          pr2
            (rad_eps
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                  [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                  (is_univalent_functor_category
                     (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                     D Duniv)
                  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                     (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                  (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                     (pair_functor H H)
                     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                  (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                     (pair_functor H H)
                     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
               (TC ∙ H)))) (x1, TC (x2, x3))
    · # TD
        (# H (id x1)
        #, pr1
             (inv_from_z_iso
                (rad_eps
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                   (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (is_univalent_functor_category
                         (precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D) D Duniv)
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                         (pair_functor H H)
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))
                      (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                         (pair_functor H H)
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))) (TC ∙ H),,
                 pr2
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))))
             (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
   · (# TD
        (id H x1
        #, rad_eps
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (is_univalent_functor_category
                   (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                   Duniv)
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
             (TC ∙ H) (x2, x3)) #, id H x4))
· # (pr1 TD)
    (id (TD (H x1, H (TC (x2, x3))), H x4)
     · (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             (pair_functor H H))
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                (pair_functor H H)
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H) (x1, TC (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
     · (id H (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3))) #, id H x4)) =
id TD (H (TC (x1, TC (x2,, x3))), H x4)

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
ptH:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (pair_functor H H
   ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
# TD
  ((pr1
      (inv_from_z_iso
         (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
            [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
            (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
               (pair_functor H H))
            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (is_univalent_functor_category
                  (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                  Duniv)
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
               (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                  (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
            (TC ∙ H),,
          pr2
            (rad_eps
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                  [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                  (is_univalent_functor_category
                     (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                     D Duniv)
                  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                     (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                  (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                     (pair_functor H H)
                     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                  (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                     (pair_functor H H)
                     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
               (TC ∙ H)))) (x1, TC (x2, x3))
    · # TD
        (# H (id x1)
        #, pr1
             (inv_from_z_iso
                (rad_eps
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                   (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (is_univalent_functor_category
                         (precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D) D Duniv)
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                         (pair_functor H H)
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))
                      (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                         (pair_functor H H)
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))) (TC ∙ H),,
                 pr2
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))))
             (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
   · (# TD
        (id H x1
        #, rad_eps
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (is_univalent_functor_category
                   (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                   Duniv)
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
             (TC ∙ H) (x2, x3)) #, id H x4))
· # (pr1 TD)
    (id (TD (H x1, H (TC (x2, x3))), H x4)
     · (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             (pair_functor H H))
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                (pair_functor H H)
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H) (x1, TC (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
     · (id H (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3))) #, id H x4)) = 
?b
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
ptH:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (pair_functor H H
   ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
?b = id TD (H (TC (x1, TC (x2,, x3))), H x4)
 
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
ptH:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (pair_functor H H
   ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
# TD
  ((pr1
      (inv_from_z_iso
         (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
            [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
            (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
               (pair_functor H H))
            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (is_univalent_functor_category
                  (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                  Duniv)
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
               (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                  (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
            (TC ∙ H),,
          pr2
            (rad_eps
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                  [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                  (is_univalent_functor_category
                     (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                     D Duniv)
                  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                     (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                  (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                     (pair_functor H H)
                     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                  (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                     (pair_functor H H)
                     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
               (TC ∙ H)))) (x1, TC (x2, x3))
    · # TD
        (# H (id x1)
        #, pr1
             (inv_from_z_iso
                (rad_eps
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                   (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (is_univalent_functor_category
                         (precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D) D Duniv)
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                         (pair_functor H H)
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))
                      (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                         (pair_functor H H)
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))) (TC ∙ H),,
                 pr2
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))))
             (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
   · (# TD
        (id H x1
        #, rad_eps
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (is_univalent_functor_category
                   (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                   Duniv)
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
             (TC ∙ H) (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
   · (id (TD (H x1, H (TC (x2, x3))), H x4)
      · (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
           [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
           (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
              (pair_functor H H))
           (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
              [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
              [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
              (is_univalent_functor_category
                 (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                 Duniv)
              (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                 D (pair_functor H H))
              (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
              (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                 (pair_functor H H)
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
           (TC ∙ H) (x1, TC (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
      · (id H (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3))) #, id H x4))) =
id TD (H (TC (x1, TC (x2,, x3))), H x4)

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
ptH:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (pair_functor H H
   ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
# TD
  ((pr1
      (inv_from_z_iso
         (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
            [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
            (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
               (pair_functor H H))
            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (is_univalent_functor_category
                  (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                  Duniv)
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
               (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                  (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
            (TC ∙ H),,
          pr2
            (rad_eps
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                  [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                  (is_univalent_functor_category
                     (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                     D Duniv)
                  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                     (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                  (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                     (pair_functor H H)
                     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                  (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                     (pair_functor H H)
                     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
               (TC ∙ H)))) (x1, TC (x2, x3))
    · # TD
        (# H (id x1)
        #, pr1
             (inv_from_z_iso
                (rad_eps
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                   (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (is_univalent_functor_category
                         (precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D) D Duniv)
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                         (pair_functor H H)
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))
                      (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                         (pair_functor H H)
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))) (TC ∙ H),,
                 pr2
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))))
             (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
   · (# TD
        (id H x1
        #, rad_eps
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (is_univalent_functor_category
                   (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                   Duniv)
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
             (TC ∙ H) (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
   · (id (TD (H x1, H (TC (x2, x3))), H x4)
      · (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
           [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
           (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
              (pair_functor H H))
           (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
              [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
              [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
              (is_univalent_functor_category
                 (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                 Duniv)
              (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                 D (pair_functor H H))
              (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
              (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                 (pair_functor H H)
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
           (TC ∙ H) (x1, TC (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
      · (id H (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3))) #, id H x4))) =
# TD (id (H (TC (x1, TC (x2,, x3))), H x4))

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
ptH:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (pair_functor H H
   ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
(pr1
   (inv_from_z_iso
      (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
         [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
         (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
            (pair_functor H H))
         (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
            [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
            [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
            (is_univalent_functor_category
               (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
               Duniv)
            (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
               (pair_functor H H))
            (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
               (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
               (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
               (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
            (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
               (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
               (pair_functor H H)
               (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
               (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
         (TC ∙ H),,
       pr2
         (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
            [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
            (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
               (pair_functor H H))
            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (is_univalent_functor_category
                  (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                  Duniv)
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
               (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                  (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
            (TC ∙ H)))) (x1, TC (x2, x3))
 · # TD
     (# H (id x1)
     #, pr1
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (rad_eps
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (is_univalent_functor_category
                      (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                      D Duniv)
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                   (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                      (pair_functor H H)
                      (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                         H_eso)
                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                   (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                      (pair_functor H H)
                      (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                         H_eso)
                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
                (TC ∙ H),,
              pr2
                (rad_eps
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                   (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (is_univalent_functor_category
                         (precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D) D Duniv)
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                         (pair_functor H H)
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))
                      (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                         (pair_functor H H)
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))))
          (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
· (# TD
     (id H x1
     #, rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             (pair_functor H H))
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                (pair_functor H H)
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H) (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
· (id (TD (H x1, H (TC (x2, x3))), H x4)
   · (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
           (pair_functor H H))
        (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
           [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
           [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
           (is_univalent_functor_category
              (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
              Duniv)
           (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
              (pair_functor H H))
           (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
              (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
              (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
              (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
           (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
              (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
              (pair_functor H H)
              (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
              (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
        (TC ∙ H) (x1, TC (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
   · (id H (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3))) #, id H x4)) =
id (H (TC (x1, TC (x2,, x3))), H x4)


        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
ptH:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (pair_functor H H
   ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
(pr1
   (inv_from_z_iso
      (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
         [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
         (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
            (pair_functor H H))
         (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
            [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
            [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
            (is_univalent_functor_category
               (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
               Duniv)
            (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
               (pair_functor H H))
            (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
               (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
               (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
               (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
            (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
               (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
               (pair_functor H H)
               (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
               (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
         (TC ∙ H),,
       pr2
         (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
            [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
            (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
               (pair_functor H H))
            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (is_univalent_functor_category
                  (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                  Duniv)
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
               (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                  (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
            (TC ∙ H)))) (x1, TC (x2, x3))
 · # TD
     (# H (id x1)
     #, pr1
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (rad_eps
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (is_univalent_functor_category
                      (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                      D Duniv)
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                   (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                      (pair_functor H H)
                      (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                         H_eso)
                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                   (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                      (pair_functor H H)
                      (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                         H_eso)
                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
                (TC ∙ H),,
              pr2
                (rad_eps
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                   (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (is_univalent_functor_category
                         (precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D) D Duniv)
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                         (pair_functor H H)
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))
                      (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                         (pair_functor H H)
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))))
          (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
· (# TD
     (id H x1
     #, rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             (pair_functor H H))
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                (pair_functor H H)
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H) (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
· ((rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
      [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
         (pair_functor H H))
      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
         [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
         [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
         (is_univalent_functor_category
            (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
         (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
            (pair_functor H H))
         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
            (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv (pair_functor H H)
            (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
      (x1, TC (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)
   · (id H (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3))) #, id H x4)) =
id (H (TC (x1, TC (x2,, x3))), H x4)

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
ptH:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (pair_functor H H
   ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
(pr1
   (inv_from_z_iso
      (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
         [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
         (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
            (pair_functor H H))
         (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
            [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
            [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
            (is_univalent_functor_category
               (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
               Duniv)
            (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
               (pair_functor H H))
            (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
               (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
               (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
               (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
            (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
               (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
               (pair_functor H H)
               (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
               (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
         (TC ∙ H),,
       pr2
         (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
            [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
            (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
               (pair_functor H H))
            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (is_univalent_functor_category
                  (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                  Duniv)
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
               (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                  (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
            (TC ∙ H)))) (x1, TC (x2, x3))
 · # TD
     (# H (id x1)
     #, pr1
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (rad_eps
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (is_univalent_functor_category
                      (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
