  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# TD
  ((pr1
      (inv_from_z_iso
         (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
            [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
            (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
               (pair_functor H H))
            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (is_univalent_functor_category
                  (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                  Duniv)
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
               (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                  (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
            (TC ∙ H),,
          pr2
            (rad_eps
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                  [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                  (is_univalent_functor_category
                     (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                     D Duniv)
                  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                     (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                  (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                     (pair_functor H H)
                     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                  (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                     (pair_functor H H)
                     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
               (TC ∙ H)))) (x2, x3),, id H x4)
   · (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
           (pair_functor H H))
        (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
           [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
           [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
           (is_univalent_functor_category
              (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
              Duniv)
           (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
              (pair_functor H H))
           (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
              (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
              (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
              (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
           (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
              (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
              (pair_functor H H)
              (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
              (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
        (TC ∙ H) (x2, x3) #, id H x4)) = ?y'

          
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
(pr1
   (inv_from_z_iso
      (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
         [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
         (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
            (pair_functor H H))
         (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
            [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
            [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
            (is_univalent_functor_category
               (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
               Duniv)
            (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
               (pair_functor H H))
            (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
               (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
               (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
               (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
            (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
               (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
               (pair_functor H H)
               (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
               (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
         (TC ∙ H),,
       pr2
         (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
            [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
            (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
               (pair_functor H H))
            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (is_univalent_functor_category
                  (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                  Duniv)
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
               (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                  (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
            (TC ∙ H)))) (x2, x3),, id H x4)
· (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
        (pair_functor H H))
     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
        [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]

           (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)

           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv (pair_functor H H)
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
     (x2, x3) #, id H x4) = ?t2

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =

· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?b = ?t2

              (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
              (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
              (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
           (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
              (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
              (pair_functor H H)
              (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
              (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
        (TC ∙ H),,
      pr2
        (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
           [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
           (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
              (pair_functor H H))
           (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
              [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
              [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
              (is_univalent_functor_category
                 (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                 Duniv)
              (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                 D (pair_functor H H))
              (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
              (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                 (pair_functor H H)
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
           (TC ∙ H)))) (x2, x3)
· rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
    [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
    (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
       (pair_functor H H))
    (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
       [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (is_univalent_functor_category
          (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
          (pair_functor H H))
       (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
          (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
          (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
          (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
       (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
          (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv (pair_functor H H)
          (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
          (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
    (x2, x3) = ?y'

          apply (pr2 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)).
        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (# H (id x1)
  #, pr1
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (rad_eps
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (is_univalent_functor_category
                   (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                   Duniv)
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
             (TC ∙ H),,
           pr2
             (rad_eps
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (is_univalent_functor_category
                      (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                      D Duniv)
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                   (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                      (pair_functor H H)
                      (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                         H_eso)
                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                   (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                      (pair_functor H H)
                      (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                         H_eso)
                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
                (TC ∙ H)))) (TC (x2, x3), x4))
· # TD
    (id H x1 · id H x1
    #, # TD
         (id (TC ∙ H) (x2, x3) #, id H x4 · id H x4)
       · rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
           [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
           (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
              (pair_functor H H))
           (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
              [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
              [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
              (is_univalent_functor_category
                 (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                 Duniv)
              (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                 D (pair_functor H H))
              (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
              (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                 (pair_functor H H)
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
           (TC ∙ H) (TC (x2, x3), x4)) =
id TD (H x1, H (TC (TC (x2, x3), x4)))

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D

ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor

  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =

· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (# H (id x1)
  #, pr1
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (rad_eps
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))

                   (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                   Duniv)
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
             (TC ∙ H),,
           pr2
             (rad_eps
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (is_univalent_functor_category
                      (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                      D Duniv)
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                   (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                      (pair_functor H H)
                      (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                         H_eso)
                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                   (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                      (pair_functor H H)
                      (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                         H_eso)
                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
                (TC ∙ H)))) (TC (x2, x3), x4))
· # TD
    (id H x1
    #, # TD (id (TC ∙ H) (x2, x3) #, id H x4)
       · rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
           [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
           (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
              (pair_functor H H))
           (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
              [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]

                 (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                 Duniv)

                 D (pair_functor H H))

           (TC ∙ H) (TC (x2, x3), x4)) =

    x

  (# H (id x1)

       (inv_from_z_iso
          (rad_eps
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]

                D (pair_functor H H))

                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                   (pair_functor H H)

                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
             (TC ∙ H),,
           pr2
             (rad_eps
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]

                         H_eso)

                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                      (pair_functor H H)

                         H_eso)
                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
                (TC ∙ H)))) (TC (x2, x3), x4))
· # TD
    (id H x1
    #, # TD (id ((TC ∙ H) (x2, x3), H x4))
       · rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
           [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]

                 D (pair_functor H H))

                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
              (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                 (pair_functor H H)
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
           (TC ∙ H) (TC (x2, x3), x4)) =

H: C ⟶ D

                D (pair_functor H H))

                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]

                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))

                      (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                      D Duniv)

                      (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                   (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D

                         H_eso)
                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                   (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                      (pair_functor H H)
                      (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                         H_eso)
                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
                (TC ∙ H)))) (TC (x2, x3), x4))
· # TD
    (id H x1
    #, id TD ((TC ∙ H) (x2, x3), H x4)
       · rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
           [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
           (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
              (pair_functor H H))
           (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
              [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
              [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
              (is_univalent_functor_category
                 (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                 Duniv)
              (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                 D (pair_functor H H))
              (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
              (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                 (pair_functor H H)
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
           (TC ∙ H) (TC (x2, x3), x4)) =
id TD (H x1, H (TC (TC (x2, x3), x4)))

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (# H (id x1)
  #, pr1
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (rad_eps
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (is_univalent_functor_category
                   (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                   Duniv)
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
             (TC ∙ H),,
           pr2
             (rad_eps
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (is_univalent_functor_category
                      (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                      D Duniv)
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                   (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                      (pair_functor H H)
                      (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                         H_eso)
                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                   (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                      (pair_functor H H)
                      (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                         H_eso)
                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
                (TC ∙ H)))) (TC (x2, x3), x4))
· # TD
    (id H x1 · id H x1
    #, id TD ((TC ∙ H) (x2, x3), H x4)
       · rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
           [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
           (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
              (pair_functor H H))
           (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
              [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
              [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
              (is_univalent_functor_category
                 (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                 Duniv)
              (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                 D (pair_functor H H))
              (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
              (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                 (pair_functor H H)
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
           (TC ∙ H) (TC (x2, x3), x4)) =
id TD (H x1, H (TC (TC (x2, x3), x4)))

    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (# H (id x1)
  #, pr1
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (rad_eps
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))

                   (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D

                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))

                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
             (TC ∙ H),,
           pr2
             (rad_eps
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (is_univalent_functor_category
                      (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                      D Duniv)
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                   (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                      (pair_functor H H)
                      (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                         H_eso)
                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                   (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                      (pair_functor H H)
                      (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                         H_eso)
                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
                (TC ∙ H)))) (TC (x2, x3), x4))
· # TD
    ((id H x1 #, id TD ((TC ∙ H) (x2, x3), H x4))
     · (id H x1
       #, rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
            [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]

                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                  (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
            (TC ∙ H) (TC (x2, x3), x4))) =

                (TC ∙ H)))) (TC (x2, x3), x4))
· (# TD (id (H x1, TD ((TC ∙ H) (x2, x3), H x4)))
   · # TD
       (id H x1
       #, rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
            [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
            (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D

                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))

                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)

                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))

                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                  (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
            (TC ∙ H) (TC (x2, x3), x4))) =
id TD (H x1, H (TC (TC (x2, x3), x4)))

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (# H (id x1)
  #, pr1
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (rad_eps
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (is_univalent_functor_category
                   (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                   Duniv)
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
             (TC ∙ H),,
           pr2
             (rad_eps
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (is_univalent_functor_category
                      (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                      D Duniv)
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                   (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                      (pair_functor H H)
                      (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                         H_eso)
                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                   (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                      (pair_functor H H)
                      (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                         H_eso)
                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
                (TC ∙ H)))) (TC (x2, x3), x4))
· (id TD (H x1, TD ((TC ∙ H) (x2, x3), H x4))
   · # TD
       (id H x1
       #, rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
            [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
            (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
               (pair_functor H H))
            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (is_univalent_functor_category
                  (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                  Duniv)
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
               (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                  (pair_functor H H)
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
            (TC ∙ H) (TC (x2, x3), x4))) =
id TD (H x1, H (TC (TC (x2, x3), x4)))

             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]

                   (pair_functor H H)

                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))

           pr2
             (rad_eps
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]

                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))

    (id H x1

H: C ⟶ D

ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor

TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =

· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# TD
  ((# H (id x1)
   #, pr1
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (rad_eps
              [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
              [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
              (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                 D (pair_functor H H))

                    D Duniv)

                    (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D

                    (pair_functor H H)

                    (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))

            pr2
              (rad_eps
                 [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                 [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                 (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                    (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                 (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                    [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                    D]
                    [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                    D]
                    (is_univalent_functor_category
                       (precategory_binproduct_data D
                          D) D Duniv)
                    (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                       (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                    (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                       (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                       (pair_functor H H)
                       (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                          H_eso)
                       (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                    (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                       (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                       (pair_functor H H)
                       (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                          H_eso)
                       (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
                 (TC ∙ H)))) (TC (x2, x3), x4))
   · (id H x1
     #, rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             (pair_functor H H))

  ((# H (id x1)
   #, pr1
        (inv_from_z_iso

                          H_eso)

                       (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                       (pair_functor H H)
                       (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                          H_eso)

                 (TC ∙ H)))) (TC (x2, x3), x4))
   · (id H x1
     #, rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]

          (TC ∙ H) (TC (x2, x3), x4))) =

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H

TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C

α: associator TC

pent: pentagon_eq TC α

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C

· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =

tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
(# H (id x1)
#, pr1
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
           [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
           (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
              (pair_functor H H))
           (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
              [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
              [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
              (is_univalent_functor_category
                 (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                 Duniv)
              (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                 D (pair_functor H H))
              (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
              (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                 (pair_functor H H)
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
           (TC ∙ H),,
         pr2
           (rad_eps
              [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
              [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
              (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                 D (pair_functor H H))
              (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                 [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                 [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                 (is_univalent_functor_category
                    (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                    D Duniv)
                 (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                    (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                 (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                    (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                    (pair_functor H H)
                    (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                    (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                 (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                    (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                    (pair_functor H H)
                    (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                    (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
              (TC ∙ H)))) (TC (x2, x3), x4))
· (id H x1
  #, rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
          (pair_functor H H))
       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
          [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (is_univalent_functor_category
             (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             (pair_functor H H))
          (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
             (pair_functor H H)
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
       (TC ∙ H) (TC (x2, x3), x4)) =
id (H x1, H (TC (TC (x2, x3), x4)))

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
(# H (id x1) · id H x1
#, pr1
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
           [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
           (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
              (pair_functor H H))
           (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
              [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
              [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
              (is_univalent_functor_category
                 (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                 Duniv)
              (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                 D (pair_functor H H))
              (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
              (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                 (pair_functor H H)
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
           (TC ∙ H),,
         pr2
           (rad_eps
              [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
              [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
              (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                 D (pair_functor H H))
              (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                 [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                 [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                 (is_univalent_functor_category
                    (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                    D Duniv)
                 (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                    (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                 (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                    (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                    (pair_functor H H)
                    (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                    (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                 (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                    (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                    (pair_functor H H)
                    (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                    (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
              (TC ∙ H)))) (TC (x2, x3), x4)
   · rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
          (pair_functor H H))
       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
          [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (is_univalent_functor_category
             (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             (pair_functor H H))
          (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
             (pair_functor H H)
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
       (TC ∙ H) (TC (x2, x3), x4)) =
id (H x1, H (TC (TC (x2, x3), x4)))

    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x

     (inv_from_z_iso
        (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]

                 D (pair_functor H H))

                 (pair_functor H H)
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
           (TC ∙ H),,
         pr2
           (rad_eps
              [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
              [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
              (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                 D (pair_functor H H))
              (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                 [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]

                    (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                    D Duniv)

                    (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                 (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                    (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                    (pair_functor H H)

                    (pair_functor H H)
                    (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                    (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
              (TC ∙ H)))) (TC (x2, x3), x4)
   · rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D

H_ff: fully_faithful H

  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =

· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
(id H x1
#, pr1
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
           [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
           (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D

                 Duniv)

                 D (pair_functor H H))

                 (pair_functor H H)

         pr2

              (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                 D (pair_functor H H))

                 [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]

                    D Duniv)

                    (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))

                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)

                 (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                    (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                    (pair_functor H H)
                    (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                    (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                 (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                    (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                    (pair_functor H H)
                    (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                    (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
              (TC ∙ H)))) (TC (x2, x3), x4)
   · rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
          (pair_functor H H))
       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
          [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (is_univalent_functor_category
             (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             (pair_functor H H))
          (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
             (pair_functor H H)
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
       (TC ∙ H) (TC (x2, x3), x4)) = ?b
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?b = id (H x1, H (TC (TC (x2, x3), x4)))
 
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
(id H x1 #, id (TC ∙ H) (TC (x2, x3), x4)) =
id (H x1, H (TC (TC (x2, x3), x4)))

        apply binprod_id.
      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
p: assoc_right_tensor_m Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3
  x4
· # TD
    (id H x1
    #, TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
         ((x2, x3), x4)) =
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (x1, TC (TC (x2, x3), x4))
?y =
assoc_right_tensor_m Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· # TD
    (id H x1
    #, TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
         ((x2, x3), x4))

      exact (! p).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
assoc_left_tensor_l Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4
· (# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
   · # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
   · # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4))))
· assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4 =
# TD
  (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     ((x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4)
· # TD (# H (α ((x1, x2), x3)) #, id H x4)
· TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
    (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)
· # H (α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· (nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (x1, TC (TC (x2, x3), x4))
   · # TD (id H x1 #, # H (α ((x2, x3), x4)))
   · # TD
       (id H x1
       #, nat_z_iso_inv
            (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
            ((x2, x3), x4)))


    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (x1, x2)
     #, id H (pr21 ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)))
  #, id functor_identity D
          (pr2
             (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H
                ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))))
· (pr11 (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)
· (# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
   · # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
   · # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4))))
· assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4 =
# TD
  (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     ((x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4)
· # TD (# H (α ((x1, x2), x3)) #, id H x4)
· TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
    (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)
· # H (α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· (nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (x1, TC (TC (x2, x3), x4))
   · # TD (id H x1 #, # H (α ((x2, x3), x4)))
   · # TD
       (id H x1
       #, nat_z_iso_inv
            (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
            ((x2, x3), x4)))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (x1, x2)
     #, id H (pr21 ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)))
  #, id functor_identity D
          (pr2
             (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H
                ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))))
· (pr11 (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)
· (# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
   · # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
   · # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4))))
· assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4 =
# TD
  (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (x1, x2) #, id H x3)
   · TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (TC (x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4)
· # TD (# H (α ((x1, x2), x3)) #, id H x4)
· TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
    (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)
· # H (α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· (nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (x1, TC (TC (x2, x3), x4))
   · # TD (id H x1 #, # H (α ((x2, x3), x4)))
   · # TD
       (id H x1
       #, nat_z_iso_inv
            (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
            ((x2, x3), x4)))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (x1, x2)
     #, id H (pr21 ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)))
  #, id functor_identity D
          (pr2
             (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H
                ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))))
· ((pr11 (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
     ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)
   · (# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
      · (# H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
         · (# H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
            · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
                x1 x2 x3 x4)))) =
# TD
  (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (x1, x2) #, id H x3)
   · TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (TC (x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4)
· (# TD (# H (α ((x1, x2), x3)) #, id H x4)
   · (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)
      · (# H (α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
         · (nat_z_iso_inv
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                 TC) (x1, TC (TC (x2, x3), x4))
            · (# TD
                 (id H x1 #, # H (α ((x2, x3), x4)))
               · # TD
                   (id H x1
                   #, nat_z_iso_inv
                        (TransportedAssocRight Duniv
                           H_eso H_ff TC)
                        ((x2, x3), x4)))))))


    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (x1, x2)
     #, id H (pr21 ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)))
  #, id functor_identity D
          (pr2
             (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H
                ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))))
· ((pr11 (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
     ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)
   · (# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
      · (# H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
         · (# H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
            · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
                x1 x2 x3 x4)))) = ?b
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?b =
# TD
  (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (x1, x2) #, id H x3)
   · TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (TC (x1, x2), x3) #, id 
  H x4)
· (# TD (# H (α ((x1, x2), x3)) #, id H x4)
   · (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)
      · (# H (α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
         · (nat_z_iso_inv
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                 TC) (x1, TC (TC (x2, x3), x4))
            · (# TD
                 (id H x1 #, # H (α ((x2, x3), x4)))
               · # TD
                   (id H x1
                   #, nat_z_iso_inv
                       (TransportedAssocRight Duniv
                       H_eso H_ff TC) 
                       ((x2, x3), x4)))))))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?b =
# TD
  (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (x1, x2) #, id H x3)
   · TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (TC (x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4)
· (# TD (# H (α ((x1, x2), x3)) #, id H x4)
   · (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)
      · (# H (α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
         · (nat_z_iso_inv
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                 TC) (x1, TC (TC (x2, x3), x4))
            · (# TD
                 (id H x1 #, # H (α ((x2, x3), x4)))
               · # TD
                   (id H x1
                   #, nat_z_iso_inv
                        (TransportedAssocRight Duniv
                           H_eso H_ff TC)
                        ((x2, x3), x4)))))))

  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =

   · TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC

H: C ⟶ D

lu: left_unitor TC I

pent: pentagon_eq TC α

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))

  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
