  (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (x1, x2) #, id H x3)
   · TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (TC (x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4 · id H x4)

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?y =
# TD
  ((# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
         (x1, x2) #, id H x3) #, id H x4)
   · (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (TC (x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4))

      apply (! functor_comp TD _ _).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (x1, x2)
     #, id H (pr21 ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)))
  #, id functor_identity D
          (pr2
             (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H
                ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))))
· ((pr11 (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
     ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)
   · (# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
      · (# H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
         · (# H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
            · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
                x1 x2 x3 x4)))) =
# TD
  (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (x1, x2) #, id H x3) #, id H x4)
· # TD
    (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (TC (x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4)
· (# TD (# H (α ((x1, x2), x3)) #, id H x4)
   · (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)
      · (# H (α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
         · (nat_z_iso_inv
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                 TC) (x1, TC (TC (x2, x3), x4))
            · (# TD
                 (id H x1 #, # H (α ((x2, x3), x4)))
               · # TD
                   (id H x1
                   #, nat_z_iso_inv
                        (TransportedAssocRight Duniv
                           H_eso H_ff TC)
                        ((x2, x3), x4)))))))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (x1, x2)
     #, id H (pr21 ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)))
  #, id functor_identity D
          (pr2
             (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H
                ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))))
· ((pr11 (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
     ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)
   · (# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
      · (# H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
         · (# H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
            · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
                x1 x2 x3 x4)))) =
# TD
  (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (x1, x2) #, id H x3) #, id H x4)
· (# TD
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (TC (x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4)
   · (# TD (# H (α ((x1, x2), x3)) #, id H x4)
      · (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
           (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)
         · (# H (α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
            · (nat_z_iso_inv
                 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                    H_ff TC)
                 (x1, TC (TC (x2, x3), x4))
               · (# TD
                    (id H x1
                    #, # H (α ((x2, x3), x4)))
                  · # TD
                      (id H x1
                      #, nat_z_iso_inv
                           (TransportedAssocRight
                              Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
                           ((x2, x3), x4))))))))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
(pr11 (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
  ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)
· (# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
   · (# H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
      · (# H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
         · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1
             x2 x3 x4))) =
# TD
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     (TC (x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4)
· (# TD (# H (α ((x1, x2), x3)) #, id H x4)
   · (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)
      · (# H (α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
         · (nat_z_iso_inv
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                 TC) (x1, TC (TC (x2, x3), x4))
            · (# TD
                 (id H x1 #, # H (α ((x2, x3), x4)))
               · # TD
                   (id H x1
                   #, nat_z_iso_inv
                        (TransportedAssocRight Duniv
                           H_eso H_ff TC)
                        ((x2, x3), x4)))))))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
(pr11 (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
  ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)
· (# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
   · (# H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
      · (# H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
         · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1
             x2 x3 x4))) = ?b
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?b =
# TD
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     (TC (x1, x2), x3) #, id 
  H x4)
· (# TD (# H (α ((x1, x2), x3)) #, id H x4)
   · (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)
      · (# H (α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
         · (nat_z_iso_inv
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                 TC) (x1, TC (TC (x2, x3), x4))
            · (# TD
                 (id H x1 #, # H (α ((x2, x3), x4)))
               · # TD
                   (id H x1
                   #, nat_z_iso_inv
                       (TransportedAssocRight Duniv
                       H_eso H_ff TC) 
                       ((x2, x3), x4)))))))
 
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
(pr11 (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
  ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)
· (# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
   · (# H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
      · (# H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
         · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1
             x2 x3 x4))) = ?b

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
(pr11 (TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
  ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4) = ?y'

      exact (TransportedAssocLeftOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (TC (x1,x2)) x3 x4).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

I: C

pent: pentagon_eq TC α

  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor

  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     (TC (x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4)
· TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
    (TC (TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)
· (# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
   · (# H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
      · (# H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
         · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1
             x2 x3 x4))) =
# TD
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     (TC (x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4)
· (# TD (# H (α ((x1, x2), x3)) #, id H x4)
   · (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)
      · (# H (α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
         · (nat_z_iso_inv
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                 TC) (x1, TC (TC (x2, x3), x4))
            · (# TD
                 (id H x1 #, # H (α ((x2, x3), x4)))
               · # TD
                   (id H x1
                   #, nat_z_iso_inv
                        (TransportedAssocRight Duniv
                           H_eso H_ff TC)
                        ((x2, x3), x4)))))))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C

ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC

pent: pentagon_eq TC α

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     (TC (x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4)
· (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     (TC (TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)
   · (# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
      · (# H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
         · (# H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
            · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
                x1 x2 x3 x4)))) =
# TD
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     (TC (x1, x2), x3) #, id H x4)
· (# TD (# H (α ((x1, x2), x3)) #, id H x4)
   · (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)
      · (# H (α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
         · (nat_z_iso_inv
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                 TC) (x1, TC (TC (x2, x3), x4))
            · (# TD
                 (id H x1 #, # H (α ((x2, x3), x4)))
               · # TD
                   (id H x1
                   #, nat_z_iso_inv
                        (TransportedAssocRight Duniv
                           H_eso H_ff TC)
                        ((x2, x3), x4)))))))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
  (TC (TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)
· (# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
   · (# H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
      · (# H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
         · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1
             x2 x3 x4))) =
# TD (# H (α ((x1, x2), x3)) #, id H x4)
· (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)
   · (# H (α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
      · (nat_z_iso_inv
           (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
           (x1, TC (TC (x2, x3), x4))
         · (# TD (id H x1 #, # H (α ((x2, x3), x4)))
            · # TD
                (id H x1
                #, nat_z_iso_inv
                     (TransportedAssocRight Duniv
                        H_eso H_ff TC) ((x2, x3), x4))))))

H: C ⟶ D

x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
  (TC (TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)
· # H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· (# H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
   · (# H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
      · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2
          x3 x4)) =
# TD (# H (α ((x1, x2), x3)) #, id H x4)
· (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)
   · (# H (α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
      · (nat_z_iso_inv
           (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
           (x1, TC (TC (x2, x3), x4))
         · (# TD (id H x1 #, # H (α ((x2, x3), x4)))
            · # TD
                (id H x1
                #, nat_z_iso_inv
                     (TransportedAssocRight Duniv
                        H_eso H_ff TC) ((x2, x3), x4))))))

TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
  (TC (TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)
· # H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· (# H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
   · (# H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
      · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2
          x3 x4)) = ?b

H: C ⟶ D

H_ff: fully_faithful H

ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC

pent: pentagon_eq TC α

TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =

· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?b =
# TD (# H (α ((x1, x2), x3)) #, id H x4)
· (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)
   · (# H (α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
      · (nat_z_iso_inv
           (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
           (x1, TC (TC (x2, x3), x4))
         · (# TD (id H x1 #, # H (α ((x2, x3), x4)))
            · # TD
                (id H x1
                #, nat_z_iso_inv
                     (TransportedAssocRight Duniv
                       H_eso H_ff TC) 
                     ((x2, x3), x4))))))

· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
  (TC (TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)
· # H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· (# H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
   · (# H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
      · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2
          x3 x4)) = ?b

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
  (TC (TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)
· # H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4)) = ?y'

      exact (! pr21 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) _ _ (α ((x1,x2),x3) #, id x4)).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# (pair_functor H H
   ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4)
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (assoc_right TC ((x1, x2), x3), x4)
· (# H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
   · (# H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
      · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2
          x3 x4)) =
# TD (# H (α ((x1, x2), x3)) #, id H x4)
· (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)
   · (# H (α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
      · (nat_z_iso_inv
           (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
           (x1, TC (TC (x2, x3), x4))
         · (# TD (id H x1 #, # H (α ((x2, x3), x4)))
            · # TD
                (id H x1
                #, nat_z_iso_inv
                     (TransportedAssocRight Duniv
                        H_eso H_ff TC) ((x2, x3), x4))))))


    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC

pent: pentagon_eq TC α

luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# (pair_functor H H
   ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4)
· ((pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
     (assoc_right TC ((x1, x2), x3), x4)
   · (# H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
      · (# H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
         · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1
             x2 x3 x4))) =
# TD (# H (α ((x1, x2), x3)) #, id H x4)
· (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)
   · (# H (α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
      · (nat_z_iso_inv
           (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
           (x1, TC (TC (x2, x3), x4))
         · (# TD (id H x1 #, # H (α ((x2, x3), x4)))
            · # TD
                (id H x1
                #, nat_z_iso_inv
                     (TransportedAssocRight Duniv
                        H_eso H_ff TC) ((x2, x3), x4))))))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α

luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# (pair_functor H H
   ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4)
· ((pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
     (assoc_right TC ((x1, x2), x3), x4)
   · (# H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
      · (# H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
         · assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1
             x2 x3 x4))) =
# TD (# H (α ((x1, x2), x3)) #, # H (id x4))
· (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     (TC (x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)
   · (# H (α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
      · (nat_z_iso_inv
           (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
           (x1, TC (TC (x2, x3), x4))
         · (# TD (id H x1 #, # H (α ((x2, x3), x4)))
            · # TD
                (id H x1
                #, nat_z_iso_inv
                     (TransportedAssocRight Duniv
                        H_eso H_ff TC) ((x2, x3), x4))))))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
· assoc_right_tensor_r Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x1 x2 x3 x4 =
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (x1, TC (TC (x2, x3), x4))
· (# TD (id H x1 #, # H (α ((x2, x3), x4)))
   · # TD
       (id H x1
       #, nat_z_iso_inv
            (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
            ((x2, x3), x4)))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
· ((pr11 (nat_z_iso_inv
            (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)))
     ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))
   · # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (id functor_identity D
             (pr1
                (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                   ((H x1, H x2),
                   TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                     TC (H x3, H x4))))
       #, # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
            (id pr21 ((H x1, H x2),
                     TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC (H x3, H x4))
            #, pr1
                 (pr2
                    (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC) (x3, x4))))) =
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (x1, TC (TC (x2, x3), x4))
· (# TD (id H x1 #, # H (α ((x2, x3), x4)))
   · # TD
       (id H x1
       #, nat_z_iso_inv
            (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
            ((x2, x3), x4)))


    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
· ((pr11 (nat_z_iso_inv
            (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)))
     ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))
   · # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (id functor_identity D
             (pr1
                (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                   ((H x1, H x2),
                   TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                     TC (H x3, H x4))))
       #, # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
            (id pr21 ((H x1, H x2),
                     TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC (H x3, H x4))
            #, pr1
                 (pr2
                    (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC) (x3, x4))))) = ?b
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?b =
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (x1, TC (TC (x2, x3), x4))
· (# TD (id H x1 #, # H (α ((x2, x3), x4)))
   · # TD
       (id H x1
       #, nat_z_iso_inv
            (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
            ((x2, x3), x4)))

H: C ⟶ D

  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =

    x
?b =
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (x1, TC (TC (x2, x3), x4))
· (# TD (id H x1 #, # H (α ((x2, x3), x4)))
   · # TD
       (id H x1
       #, nat_z_iso_inv
            (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
            ((x2, x3), x4)))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?b =
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (x1, TC (TC (x2, x3), x4))
· # TD (id H x1 #, # H (α ((x2, x3), x4)))
· # TD
    (id H x1
    #, nat_z_iso_inv
         (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
         ((x2, x3), x4))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?y =
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (x1, TC (TC (x2, x3), x4))
· # TD (id H x1 #, # H (α ((x2, x3), x4)))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
?y =
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (x1, TC (TC (x2, x3), x4))
· # TD (# H (id x1) #, # H (α ((x2, x3), x4)))

      exact (pr21 (nat_z_iso_inv (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)) _ _ (id x1 #, α ((x2,x3),x4))).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
· ((pr11 (nat_z_iso_inv
            (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)))
     ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))
   · # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (id functor_identity D
             (pr1
                (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                   ((H x1, H x2),
                   TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                     TC (H x3, H x4))))
       #, # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
            (id pr21 ((H x1, H x2),
                     TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC (H x3, H x4))
            #, pr1
                 (pr2
                    (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC) (x3, x4))))) =
# (TC ∙ H) (id x1 #, α ((x2, x3), x4))
· (pr11 (nat_z_iso_inv
           (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)))
    (x1, assoc_right TC ((x2, x3), x4))
· # TD
    (id H x1
    #, nat_z_iso_inv
         (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
         ((x2, x3), x4))


    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C

pent: pentagon_eq TC α

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
# H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
· ((pr11 (nat_z_iso_inv
            (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)))
     ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))
   · # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (id functor_identity D
             (pr1
                (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                   ((H x1, H x2),
                   TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                     TC (H x3, H x4))))
       #, # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
            (id pr21 ((H x1, H x2),
                     TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC (H x3, H x4))
            #, pr1
                 (pr2
                    (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC) (x3, x4))))) =
# (TC ∙ H) (id x1 #, α ((x2, x3), x4))
· ((pr11 (nat_z_iso_inv
            (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)))
     (x1, assoc_right TC ((x2, x3), x4))
   · # TD
       (id H x1
       #, nat_z_iso_inv
            (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
            ((x2, x3), x4)))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
(pr11 (nat_z_iso_inv
         (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)))
  ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))
· # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    (id functor_identity D
          (pr1
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                ((H x1, H x2),
                TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
                  (H x3, H x4))))
    #, # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
         (id pr21 ((H x1, H x2),
                  TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                    TC (H x3, H x4))
         #, pr1
              (pr2
                 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                    H_ff TC) (x3, x4)))) =
(pr11 (nat_z_iso_inv
         (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)))
  (x1, assoc_right TC ((x2, x3), x4))
· # TD
    (id H x1
    #, nat_z_iso_inv
         (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
         ((x2, x3), x4))

H: C ⟶ D

  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =

    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

         (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)))

                  TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                    TC (H x3, H x4))
         #, pr1
              (pr2
                 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                    H_ff TC) (x3, x4)))) = ?b

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))

TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =

· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
(pr11 (nat_z_iso_inv
         (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)))
  ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))
· # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    (id functor_identity D
          (pr1
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                ((H x1, H x2),
                TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
                  (H x3, H x4))))
    #, # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
         (id pr21 ((H x1, H x2),
                  TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                    TC (H x3, H x4))
         #, pr1
              (pr2
                 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                    H_ff TC) (x3, x4)))) = ?b

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D

H_ff: fully_faithful H

I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α

ID:= H I: D

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))

TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
(pr11 (nat_z_iso_inv
         (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)))
  ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)) = ?y'

      apply (TransportedAssocRightInvOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC).

H: C ⟶ D

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (x1, TC (x2, TC (x3, x4)))
· # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    (# H (id x1)
    #, nat_z_iso_inv
         (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
         (x2, TC (x3, x4)))
· # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    (id functor_identity D
          (pr1
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                ((H x1, H x2),
                TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
                  (H x3, H x4))))
    #, # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
         (id pr21 ((H x1, H x2),
                  TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                    TC (H x3, H x4))
         #, pr1
              (pr2
                 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                    H_ff TC) (x3, x4)))) =
(pr11 (nat_z_iso_inv
         (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)))
  (x1, assoc_right TC ((x2, x3), x4))
· # TD
    (id H x1
    #, nat_z_iso_inv
         (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
         ((x2, x3), x4))


    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (x1, TC (x2, TC (x3, x4)))
· (# (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (# H (id x1)
     #, nat_z_iso_inv
          (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
          (x2, TC (x3, x4)))
   · # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (id functor_identity D
             (pr1
                (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                   ((H x1, H x2),
                   TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                     TC (H x3, H x4))))
       #, # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
            (id pr21 ((H x1, H x2),
                     TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC (H x3, H x4))
            #, pr1
                 (pr2
                    (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC) (x3, x4))))) =
(pr11 (nat_z_iso_inv
         (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)))
  (x1, assoc_right TC ((x2, x3), x4))
· # TD
    (id H x1
    #, nat_z_iso_inv
         (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
         ((x2, x3), x4))

TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
(id H x1
 · id functor_identity D
        (pr1
           (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
              ((H x1, H x2),
              TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
                (H x3, H x4))))
#, nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (x2, TC (x3, x4))
   · # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (id pr21 ((H x1, H x2),
                TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
                  (H x3, H x4))
       #, pr1
            (pr2
               (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                  TC) (x3, x4)))) =
(id H x1
#, nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     ((x2, x3), x4))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
(id functor_identity D
      (pr1
         (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
            ((H x1, H x2),
            TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
              (H x3, H x4))))
#, nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (x2, TC (x3, x4))
   · # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (id pr21 ((H x1, H x2),
                TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
                  (H x3, H x4))
       #, pr1
            (pr2
               (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                  TC) (x3, x4)))) =
(id H x1
#, nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     ((x2, x3), x4))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (x2, TC (x3, x4))
· # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    (id pr21 ((H x1, H x2),
             TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
               (H x3, H x4))
    #, pr1
         (pr2
            (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
            (x3, x4))) =
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  ((x2, x3), x4)


    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (x2, TC (x3, x4))
· # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    (id pr21 ((H x1, H x2),
             TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
               (H x3, H x4))
    #, pr1
         (pr2
            (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
            (x3, x4))) =
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (x2, TC (x3, x4))
· # (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    (# H (id x2)
    #, nat_z_iso_inv
         (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
         (x3, x4))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
(id pr21 ((H x1, H x2),
         TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
           (H x3, H x4))
#, pr1
     (pr2 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
        (x3, x4))) =
(# H (id x2)
#, nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (x3, x4))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
pentH: # H (pr1 α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))) =
# H (# TC (pr1 α ((x1, x2), x3) #, id x4))
· # H (pr1 α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # H (# TC (id x1 #, pr1 α ((x2, x3), x4)))
tαD:= TransportedAssociatorOnOb Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: ∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α
  (pair_functor (pair_functor H H) H x) =
TransportedAssocLeft Duniv H_eso H_ff TC x
· # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv
    (TransportedAssocRight Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    x
id pr21 ((H x1, H x2),
        TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
          (H x3, H x4)) = # H (id x2)

    apply (! functor_id _ _).
  Qed.

  Definition TransportedMonoidal
    : monoidal_cat
    := D ,, TD ,, H I ,, luD ,, ruD ,, αD ,, TransportedTriangleEq ,, TransportedPentagonEq.

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
functor_monoidal_cat lu luD ru ruD α αD

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
functor_monoidal_cat lu luD ru ruD α αD

H: C ⟶ D

  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
functor_monoidal_disp_cat lu luD ru ruD α αD
  (H,,
   pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC),,
   id H I)

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
(functor_lu_disp_cat lu luD
 × functor_ru_disp_cat ru ruD)%disp_cat
  (H,,
   pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC),,
   id H I)

   id H I)
 exact (H_plu Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu).

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H

   id H I)
 exact (H_pru Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
functor_ass_disp_cat α αD
  (H,,
   pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC),,
   id H I)
 exact (H_pα Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α I).
  Defined.

  Context {E : category}
          (Euniv : is_univalent E)
          (TE : functor (E ⊠ E) E) (IE : E)

          (ruE : right_unitor TE IE)
          (αE : associator TE).

Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
disp_functor_data (total_functor precompMonoidal)
  (functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD
     αE)
  (functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat lu luE ru ruE α αE)
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
(λ FF : disp_functor_data
          (total_functor precompMonoidal)
          (functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE
             ruD ruE αD αE)
          (functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat lu luE ru
             ruE α αE), 
 disp_functor_axioms FF) 
  ?pr1

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
∏
(x
 y : total_category
       (functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD
          αE))
(xx : functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE
        αD αE x)
(yy : functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE
        αD αE y)
(f : total_category
       (functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD
          αE) ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
→ strong_functor_composition (pr2 H_strong_monoidal)
    xx -->[
  # (total_functor precompMonoidal) f] strong_functor_composition
                                         (pr2
                                            H_strong_monoidal)
                                         yy

      intro ; intros ; exact tt.
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
(λ FF : disp_functor_data
          (total_functor precompMonoidal)
          (functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE
             ruD ruE αD αE)
          (functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat lu luE ru
             ruE α αE), disp_functor_axioms FF)
  ((λ (F : total_category
             (functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD
                ruE αD αE))
    (pFi : functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE
             ruD ruE αD αE F),
    strong_functor_composition (pr2 H_strong_monoidal)
      pFi),,
   (λ (x
       y : total_category
             (functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD
                ruE αD αE))
    (xx : functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD
            ruE αD αE x)
    (yy : functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD
            ruE αD αE y)
    (f : total_category
           (functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE
              αD αE) ⟦ x, y ⟧) (_ : xx -->[ f] yy), tt))
 abstract (split ; intro ; intros ; apply isapropunit).
  Defined.

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
disp_functor_ff precompMonoidal

x, y: total_category
  (functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE)
xx: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE
  αD αE x
yy: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE
  αD αE y
f: total_category
  (functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE)
⟦ x, y ⟧
isweq
  (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy,
   (♯ precompStrongMonoidal)%mor_disp ff)

  αD αE y
f: total_category
  (functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE)
⟦ x, y ⟧
iscontr (xx -->[ f] yy)

    apply iscontrunit.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj precompMonoidal

is_nat_z_iso
  (pr121 x
   :
   functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x)
   ⟹ functor_tensor_map_codom
       (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (pr11 x))

          :

 is_z_isomorphism (pr221 x))

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
x: total_category
  (functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE)
xx: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat lu luE ru ruE α
  αE (total_functor precompMonoidal x)
is_nat_z_iso
  (pr121 x
   :
   functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x)
   ⟹ functor_tensor_map_codom
       (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (pr11 x))

  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
  (pair_functor H H
   ∙ functor_tensor_map_codom
       (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (pr11 x))

          exact (post_whisker_nat_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)) (pr11 x)).
        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D

i:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (E,, Euniv) 
  (pair_functor H H)
  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (make_nat_z_iso
        (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
           (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
        (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
           (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
        (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
        (pr1 xx))
     (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
        (nat_z_iso_inv
           (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
              TC)) (pr11 x))): nat_z_iso (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr11 x))

  (pr121 x
   :
   functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x)
   ⟹ functor_tensor_map_codom
       (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (pr11 x))

  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr11 x))
?b = pre_whisker (pair_functor H H) (pr121 x)
 
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
x: total_category
  (functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE)
xx: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat lu luE ru ruE α
  αE (total_functor precompMonoidal x)
i:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (E,, Euniv) 
  (pair_functor H H)
  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (make_nat_z_iso
        (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
           (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
        (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
           (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
        (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
        (pr1 xx))
     (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
        (nat_z_iso_inv
           (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
              TC)) (pr11 x))): nat_z_iso (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr11 x))
pre_whisker (pair_functor H H) (pr1 i) = ?b
 apply lift_nat_trans_along_comm.

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
