E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
x: total_category
  (functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE)
xx: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat lu luE ru ruE α
  αE (total_functor precompMonoidal x)
i:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (E,, Euniv) 
  (pair_functor H H)
  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (make_nat_z_iso
        (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
           (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
        (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
           (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
        (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
        (pr1 xx))
     (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
        (nat_z_iso_inv
           (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
              TC)) (pr11 x))): nat_z_iso (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr11 x))
cc: C ⊠ C
(pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))
· # (pr11 x)
    (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
          (pair_functor H H))
       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
          [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (is_univalent_functor_category
             (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             (pair_functor H H))
          (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
             (pair_functor H H)
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
       (TC ∙ H) cc)
· # (pr111 x)
    (pr1
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (rad_eps
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (is_univalent_functor_category
                   (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                   Duniv)
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
             (TC ∙ H),,
           pr2
             (rad_eps
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (is_univalent_functor_category
                      (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                      D Duniv)
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                   (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                      (pair_functor H H)
                      (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                         H_eso)
                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                   (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                      (pair_functor H H)
                      (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                         H_eso)
                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
                (TC ∙ H)))) cc) =
(pr112 (pr1 x)) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))

          
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
x: total_category
  (functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE)
xx: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat lu luE ru ruE α
  αE (total_functor precompMonoidal x)
i:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (E,, Euniv) 
  (pair_functor H H)
  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (make_nat_z_iso
        (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
           (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
        (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
           (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
        (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
        (pr1 xx))
     (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
        (nat_z_iso_inv
           (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
              TC)) (pr11 x))): nat_z_iso (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr11 x))
cc: C ⊠ C
(pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))
· (# (pr11 x)
     (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
           (pair_functor H H))
        (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
           [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
           [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
           (is_univalent_functor_category
              (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
              Duniv)
           (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
              (pair_functor H H))
           (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
              (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
              (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
              (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
           (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
              (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
              (pair_functor H H)
              (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
              (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
        (TC ∙ H) cc)
   · # (pr111 x)
       (pr1
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (rad_eps
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (is_univalent_functor_category
                      (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                      D Duniv)
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                   (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                      (pair_functor H H)
                      (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                         H_eso)
                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                   (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                      (pair_functor H H)
                      (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                         H_eso)
                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
                (TC ∙ H),,
              pr2
                (rad_eps
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                   (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (is_univalent_functor_category
                         (precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D) D Duniv)
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                         (pair_functor H H)
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))
                      (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                         (pair_functor H H)
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)))) cc)) =
(pr112 (pr1 x)) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))

(pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))
· # (pr11 x)
    (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]

             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
             (pair_functor H H)
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
       (TC ∙ H) cc
     · pr1
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (rad_eps
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))

                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D

             pr2
               (rad_eps
                  [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                     (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                     [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                     D]
                     [precategory_binproduct_data C C,

                     (is_univalent_functor_category
                        (precategory_binproduct_data D
                           D) D Duniv)
                     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                        (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))

                        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D

                        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                           H_eso)

H: C ⟶ D

        (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
           (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
        (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))

        (nat_z_iso_inv
           (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
              TC)) (pr11 x))): nat_z_iso (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x))

     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

cc: C ⊠ C
(pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))
· # (pr11 x)
    (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
          (pair_functor H H))

             (pair_functor H H)

     · pr1
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (rad_eps

               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)

                     (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                  (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                     (pair_functor H H)
                     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                  (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                     (pair_functor H H)
                     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
               (TC ∙ H),,
             pr2
               (rad_eps
                  [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                     (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                     [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                     D]
                     [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                     D]
                     (is_univalent_functor_category
                        (precategory_binproduct_data D
                           D) D Duniv)
                     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                        (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D

                        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                           H_eso)
                        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
                  (TC ∙ H)))) cc) = ?b

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
x: total_category
  (functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE)

i:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (E,, Euniv) 
  (pair_functor H H)
  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (make_nat_z_iso
        (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
           (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
        (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
           (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
        (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
        (pr1 xx))
     (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
        (nat_z_iso_inv
           (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
              TC)) (pr11 x))): nat_z_iso (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr11 x))

?b = (pr112 (pr1 x)) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))

  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (make_nat_z_iso
        (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
           (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
        (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
           (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
        (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
        (pr1 xx))
     (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
        (nat_z_iso_inv
           (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
              TC)) (pr11 x))): nat_z_iso (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr11 x))
cc: C ⊠ C
(pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))
· # (pr11 x)
    (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
          (pair_functor H H))
       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
          [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (is_univalent_functor_category
             (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             (pair_functor H H))
          (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
             (pair_functor H H)
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
       (TC ∙ H) cc
     · pr1
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (rad_eps
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
               (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                  [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                  (is_univalent_functor_category
                     (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                     D Duniv)
                  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                     (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                  (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                     (pair_functor H H)
                     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                  (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                     (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                     (pair_functor H H)
                     (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                     (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
               (TC ∙ H),,
             pr2
               (rad_eps
                  [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                     (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                     [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                     D]
                     [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                     D]
                     (is_univalent_functor_category
                        (precategory_binproduct_data D
                           D) D Duniv)
                     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                        (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                        (pair_functor H H)
                        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                           H_eso)
                        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                        (pair_functor H H)
                        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                           H_eso)
                        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
                  (TC ∙ H)))) cc) = ?b

            
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
x: total_category
  (functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE)
xx: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat lu luE ru ruE α
  αE (total_functor precompMonoidal x)
i:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (E,, Euniv) 
  (pair_functor H H)
  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (make_nat_z_iso
        (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
           (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
        (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
           (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
        (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
        (pr1 xx))
     (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
        (nat_z_iso_inv
           (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
              TC)) (pr11 x))): nat_z_iso (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr11 x))
cc: C ⊠ C
rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
     (pair_functor H H))
  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
     [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (is_univalent_functor_category
        (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
        (pair_functor H H))
     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv (pair_functor H H)
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc
· pr1
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             (pair_functor H H))
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H)
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                (pair_functor H H)
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H),,
        pr2
          (rad_eps
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D (pair_functor H H))
             (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (is_univalent_functor_category
                   (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                   Duniv)
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                   (pair_functor H H)
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
             (TC ∙ H)))) cc = ?t2

            apply (pr2 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)).
          
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
x: total_category
  (functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE)
xx: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat lu luE ru ruE α
  αE (total_functor precompMonoidal x)
i:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (E,, Euniv) 
  (pair_functor H H)
  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (make_nat_z_iso
        (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
           (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
        (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
           (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
        (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
        (pr1 xx))
     (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
        (nat_z_iso_inv
           (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
              TC)) (pr11 x))): nat_z_iso (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr11 x))
cc: C ⊠ C
(pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))
· # (pr11 x)
    (id (pair_functor H H
         ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) cc) =
(pr112 (pr1 x)) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))

       ((pair_functor H H
         ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) cc) =

          apply id_right.

H: C ⟶ D

  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr11 x))
p: pr1 i = pr121 x
is_nat_z_iso
  (pr121 x
   :
   functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x)
   ⟹ functor_tensor_map_codom
       (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (pr11 x))

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I

pent: pentagon_eq TC α

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

  (functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE)

i:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (E,, Euniv) 
  (pair_functor H H)
  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (make_nat_z_iso
        (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
           (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
        (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
           (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
        (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
        (pr1 xx))
     (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
        (nat_z_iso_inv

  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr11 x))
p: pr1 i = pr121 x
is_nat_z_iso (pr1 i)

        exact (pr2 i).
      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
x: total_category
  (functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE)
xx: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat lu luE ru ruE α
  αE (total_functor precompMonoidal x)
(λ _ : is_nat_z_iso
         (pr121 x
          :
          functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x)
          ⟹ functor_tensor_map_codom
              (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
              (pr11 x)), is_z_isomorphism (pr221 x))
  (let i :=
     lift_nat_z_iso_along (E,, Euniv)
       (pair_functor H H)
       (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
       (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
       (nat_z_iso_comp
          (make_nat_z_iso
             (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
             (pr1 xx))
          (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_inv
                (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                   H_ff TC)) (pr11 x))) in
   let p :=
     lift_nat_trans_eq_along (E,, Euniv)
       (pair_functor H H)
       (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
       (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
       (lift_nat_trans_along_comm (E,, Euniv)
          (pair_functor H H)
          (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
          (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
          (nat_z_iso_comp
             (make_nat_z_iso
                (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                   (pr11 (total_functor
                            precompMonoidal x)))
                (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                   (pr11 (total_functor
                            precompMonoidal x)))
                (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal
                          x)) (pr1 xx))
             (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
                (nat_z_iso_inv
                   (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                      H_ff TC)) (pr11 x))) @
        idpath
          (nat_trans_comp
             (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_composite_data
                (pair_functor H H
                 ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                     TC) (pr11 x))
             (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
             (post_whisker
                (nat_z_iso_inv
                   (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                      H_ff TC)) (pr11 x))) @
        nat_trans_eq E
          (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
             (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
          (functor_composite_data
             (pair_functor H H
              ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
             (pr11 x))
          (nat_trans_comp
             (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_composite_data
                (pair_functor H H
                 ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                     TC) (pr11 x))
             (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
             (post_whisker
                (nat_z_iso_inv
                   (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                      H_ff TC)) (pr11 x)))
          (pre_whisker (pair_functor H H) (pr121 x))
          (λ cc : C ⊠ C,
           internal_paths_rew_r
             (E
              ⟦ TE
                  ((pr11 x) (H (pr1 cc)),
                  (pr11 x) (H (pr2 cc))),
              (pr11 x)
                (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
                   (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))) ⟧)
             ((pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))
              · # (pr11 x)
                  (rad_eps
                     [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                     D]
                     [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                     D]
                     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                        (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                        [precategory_binproduct_data D
                           D, D]
                        [precategory_binproduct_data C
                           C, D]
                        (is_univalent_functor_category
                           (precategory_binproduct_data
                              D D) D Duniv)
                        (pre_composition_functor
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                           (pair_functor H H))
                        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                           (pair_functor H H)
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))
                        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                           (pair_functor H H)
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc)
              · # (pr111 x)
                  (pr1
                     (inv_from_z_iso
                        (rad_eps
                           [precategory_binproduct_data
                              D D, D]
                           [precategory_binproduct_data
                              C C, D]
                           (pre_composition_functor
                              (...) (...) D (...))
                           (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                              [..., D] [..., D] (...)
                              (...) (...) (...))
                           (TC ∙ H),,
                         pr2
                           (rad_eps [..., D] [..., D]
                              (...) (...) (...)))) cc))
             ((pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))
              · (# (pr11 x)
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc)
                 · # (pr111 x)
                     (pr1
                        (inv_from_z_iso
                           (rad_eps [..., D] [..., D]
                              (...) (...) (...),,
                            pr2 (...))) cc)))
             (λ p : E
                    ⟦ TE
                        ((pr11 x) (H (pr1 cc)),
                        (pr11 x) (H (pr2 cc))),
                    (pr11 x)
                      (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                         H_ff TC
                         (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))) ⟧,
              p =
              (pr112 (pr1 x)) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
             (internal_paths_rew
                (E
                 ⟦ (pr11 x)
                     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                        H_ff TC
                        (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))),
                 (pr11 x)
                   (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                      TC (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))) ⟧)
                (# (pr11 x)
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc
                    · pr1
                        (inv_from_z_iso
                           (rad_eps [..., D] [..., D]
                              (...) (...) (...),,
                            pr2 (...))) cc))
                (λ p : E
                       ⟦ (pr11 x)
                           (TransportedTensor Duniv
                              H_eso H_ff TC
                              (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))),
                       (pr11 x)
                         (TransportedTensor Duniv
                            H_eso H_ff TC
                            (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
                       ⟧,
                 (pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))
                 · p =
                 (pr112 (pr1 x))
                   (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
                (maponpaths
                   (compose
                      ((pr121 x)
                         (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))))
                   (maponpaths # (pr11 x)
                      (let X := λ c : C ⊠ C, pr2 (...)
                         in
                       let X0 := λ c : ..., pr1 ... in
                       X0 cc)) @
                 internal_paths_rew_r
                   (E
                    ⟦ (pr11 x)
                        ((pair_functor H H
                          ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv
                              H_eso H_ff TC) cc),
                    (pr11 x)
                      ((pair_functor H H
                        ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv
                            H_eso H_ff TC) cc) ⟧)
                   (# (pr11 x)
                      (id (pair_functor H H
                           ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv
                               H_eso H_ff TC) cc))
                   (id (pr11 x)
                         ((pair_functor H H
                           ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv
                               H_eso H_ff TC) cc))
                   (λ p : E ⟦ (pr11 x) ((...) cc),
                          (pr11 x) ((...) cc) ⟧,
                    (pr121 x) (H (...), H (...)) · p =
                    (pr112 (pr1 x))
                      (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
                   (id_right
                      ((pr112 (pr1 x))
                         (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))))
                   (functor_id (pr11 x)
                      ((pair_functor H H
                        ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv
                            H_eso H_ff TC) cc)))
                (# (pr11 x)
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc)
                 · # (pr11 x)
                     (pr1
                        (inv_from_z_iso
                           (rad_eps [..., D] [..., D]
                              (...) (...) (...),,
                            pr2 (...))) cc))
                (functor_comp (pr11 x)
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc)
                   (pr1
                      (inv_from_z_iso
                         (rad_eps
                            [precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D, D]
                            [precategory_binproduct_data
                               C C, D]
                            (pre_composition_functor
                               ... ... D ...)
                            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                               ... ... ... ... ... ...)
                            (TC ∙ H),,
                          pr2
                            (rad_eps ... ... ... ...
                               ...))) cc)))
             (assoc'
                ((pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
                (# (pr11 x)
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor

                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D

                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff

                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc))
                (# (pr111 x)
                   (pr1
                      (inv_from_z_iso
                         (rad_eps
                            [precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D, D]
                            [precategory_binproduct_data
                               C C, D]
                            (pre_composition_functor
                               ... ... D ...)
                            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                               ... ... ... ... ... ...)
                            (TC ∙ H),,
                          pr2
                            (rad_eps ... ... ... ...
                               ...))) cc)))
           :
           nat_trans_comp
             (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_composite_data
                (pair_functor H H
                 ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                     TC) (pr11 x))
             (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
             (post_whisker
                (nat_z_iso_inv
                   (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                      H_ff TC)) (pr11 x)) cc =
           pre_whisker (pair_functor H H) (pr121 x) cc))
     in
   internal_paths_rew
     (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x)
      ⟹ functor_tensor_map_codom
          (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
          (pr11 x)) (pr1 i)
     (λ n : functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x)
            ⟹ functor_tensor_map_codom
                (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
                (pr11 x), is_nat_z_iso n) (pr2 i)
     (pr121 x) p)
 
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
x: total_category
  (functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE)
xx: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat lu luE ru ruE α
  αE (total_functor precompMonoidal x)
a:= pr2 xx: (λ _ : is_nat_z_iso
         (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)
          :
          functor_tensor_map_dom TE
            (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
          ⟹ functor_tensor_map_codom TC
              (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal
                       x))),
 is_z_isomorphism
   (pr221 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
  (pr1 xx)
(λ _ : is_nat_z_iso
         (pr121 x
          :
          functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x)
          ⟹ functor_tensor_map_codom
              (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
              (pr11 x)), is_z_isomorphism (pr221 x))
  (let i :=
     lift_nat_z_iso_along (E,, Euniv)
       (pair_functor H H)
       (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
       (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
       (nat_z_iso_comp
          (make_nat_z_iso
             (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
             (pr1 xx))
          (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_inv
                (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                   H_ff TC)) (pr11 x))) in
   let p :=
     lift_nat_trans_eq_along (E,, Euniv)
       (pair_functor H H)
       (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
       (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
       (lift_nat_trans_along_comm (E,, Euniv)
          (pair_functor H H)
          (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
          (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
          (nat_z_iso_comp
             (make_nat_z_iso
                (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                   (pr11 (total_functor
                            precompMonoidal x)))
                (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                   (pr11 (total_functor
                            precompMonoidal x)))
                (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal
                          x)) (pr1 xx))
             (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
                (nat_z_iso_inv
                   (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                      H_ff TC)) (pr11 x))) @
        idpath
          (nat_trans_comp
             (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_composite_data
                (pair_functor H H
                 ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                     TC) (pr11 x))
             (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
             (post_whisker
                (nat_z_iso_inv
                   (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                      H_ff TC)) (pr11 x))) @
        nat_trans_eq E
          (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
             (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
          (functor_composite_data
             (pair_functor H H
              ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
             (pr11 x))
          (nat_trans_comp
             (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_composite_data
                (pair_functor H H
                 ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                     TC) (pr11 x))
             (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
             (post_whisker
                (nat_z_iso_inv
                   (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                      H_ff TC)) (pr11 x)))
          (pre_whisker (pair_functor H H) (pr121 x))
          (λ cc : C ⊠ C,
           internal_paths_rew_r
             (E
              ⟦ TE
                  ((pr11 x) (H (pr1 cc)),
                  (pr11 x) (H (pr2 cc))),
              (pr11 x)
                (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
                   (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))) ⟧)
             ((pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))
              · # (pr11 x)
                  (rad_eps
                     [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                     D]
                     [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                     D]
                     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                        (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                        [precategory_binproduct_data D
                           D, D]
                        [precategory_binproduct_data C
                           C, D]
                        (is_univalent_functor_category
                           (precategory_binproduct_data
                              D D) D Duniv)
                        (pre_composition_functor
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                           (pair_functor H H))
                        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                           (pair_functor H H)
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))
                        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                           (pair_functor H H)
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc)
              · # (pr111 x)
                  (pr1
                     (inv_from_z_iso
                        (rad_eps
                           [precategory_binproduct_data
                              D D, D]
                           [precategory_binproduct_data
                              C C, D]
                           (pre_composition_functor
                              (...) (...) D (...))
                           (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                              [..., D] [..., D] (...)
                              (...) (...) (...))
                           (TC ∙ H),,
                         pr2
                           (rad_eps [..., D] [..., D]
                              (...) (...) (...)))) cc))
             ((pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))
              · (# (pr11 x)
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc)
                 · # (pr111 x)
                     (pr1
                        (inv_from_z_iso
                           (rad_eps [..., D] [..., D]
                              (...) (...) (...),,
                            pr2 (...))) cc)))
             (λ p : E
                    ⟦ TE
                        ((pr11 x) (H (pr1 cc)),
                        (pr11 x) (H (pr2 cc))),
                    (pr11 x)
                      (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                         H_ff TC
                         (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))) ⟧,
              p =
              (pr112 (pr1 x)) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
             (internal_paths_rew
                (E
                 ⟦ (pr11 x)
                     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                        H_ff TC
                        (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))),
                 (pr11 x)
                   (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                      TC (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))) ⟧)
                (# (pr11 x)
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc
                    · pr1
                        (inv_from_z_iso
                           (rad_eps [..., D] [..., D]
                              (...) (...) (...),,
                            pr2 (...))) cc))
                (λ p : E
                       ⟦ (pr11 x)
                           (TransportedTensor Duniv
                              H_eso H_ff TC
                              (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))),
                       (pr11 x)
                         (TransportedTensor Duniv
                            H_eso H_ff TC
                            (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
                       ⟧,
                 (pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))
                 · p =
                 (pr112 (pr1 x))
                   (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
                (maponpaths
                   (compose
                      ((pr121 x)
                         (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))))
                   (maponpaths # (pr11 x)
                      (let X := λ c : C ⊠ C, pr2 (...)
                         in
                       let X0 := λ c : ..., pr1 ... in
                       X0 cc)) @
                 internal_paths_rew_r
                   (E
                    ⟦ (pr11 x)
                        ((pair_functor H H
                          ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv
                              H_eso H_ff TC) cc),
                    (pr11 x)
                      ((pair_functor H H
                        ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv
                            H_eso H_ff TC) cc) ⟧)
                   (# (pr11 x)
                      (id (pair_functor H H
                           ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv
                               H_eso H_ff TC) cc))
                   (id (pr11 x)
                         ((pair_functor H H
                           ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv
                               H_eso H_ff TC) cc))
                   (λ p : E ⟦ (pr11 x) ((...) cc),
                          (pr11 x) ((...) cc) ⟧,
                    (pr121 x) (H (...), H (...)) · p =
                    (pr112 (pr1 x))
                      (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
                   (id_right
                      ((pr112 (pr1 x))
                         (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))))
                   (functor_id (pr11 x)
                      ((pair_functor H H
                        ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv
                            H_eso H_ff TC) cc)))
                (# (pr11 x)
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc)
                 · # (pr11 x)
                     (pr1
                        (inv_from_z_iso
                           (rad_eps [..., D] [..., D]
                              (...) (...) (...),,
                            pr2 (...))) cc))
                (functor_comp (pr11 x)
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc)
                   (pr1
                      (inv_from_z_iso
                         (rad_eps
                            [precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D, D]
                            [precategory_binproduct_data
                               C C, D]
                            (pre_composition_functor
                               ... ... D ...)
                            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                               ... ... ... ... ... ...)
                            (TC ∙ H),,
                          pr2
                            (rad_eps ... ... ... ...
                               ...))) cc)))
             (assoc'
                ((pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
                (# (pr11 x)
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc))
                (# (pr111 x)
                   (pr1
                      (inv_from_z_iso
                         (rad_eps
                            [precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D, D]
                            [precategory_binproduct_data
                               C C, D]
                            (pre_composition_functor
                               ... ... D ...)
                            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                               ... ... ... ... ... ...)
                            (TC ∙ H),,
                          pr2
                            (rad_eps ... ... ... ...
                               ...))) cc)))
           :
           nat_trans_comp
             (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_composite_data
                (pair_functor H H
                 ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                     TC) (pr11 x))
             (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
             (post_whisker
                (nat_z_iso_inv
                   (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                      H_ff TC)) (pr11 x)) cc =
           pre_whisker (pair_functor H H) (pr121 x) cc))
     in
   internal_paths_rew
     (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x)
      ⟹ functor_tensor_map_codom
          (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
          (pr11 x)) (pr1 i)
     (λ n : functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x)
            ⟹ functor_tensor_map_codom
                (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
                (pr11 x), is_nat_z_iso n) (pr2 i)
     (pr121 x) p)

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
x: total_category
  (functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE)
xx: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat lu luE ru ruE α
  αE (total_functor precompMonoidal x)
a:= pr2 xx: is_z_isomorphism
  (pr221 x
   · # (pr111 x) (id LiftedTensorUnit.ID I))
(λ _ : is_nat_z_iso
         (pr121 x
          :
          functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x)
          ⟹ functor_tensor_map_codom
              (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
              (pr11 x)), is_z_isomorphism (pr221 x))
  (let i :=
     lift_nat_z_iso_along (E,, Euniv)
       (pair_functor H H)
       (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
       (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
       (nat_z_iso_comp
          (make_nat_z_iso
             (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
             (pr1 xx))
          (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_inv
                (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                   H_ff TC)) (pr11 x))) in
   let p :=
     lift_nat_trans_eq_along (E,, Euniv)
       (pair_functor H H)
       (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
       (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
       (lift_nat_trans_along_comm (E,, Euniv)
          (pair_functor H H)
          (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
          (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
          (nat_z_iso_comp
             (make_nat_z_iso
                (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                   (pr11 (total_functor
                            precompMonoidal x)))
                (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                   (pr11 (total_functor
                            precompMonoidal x)))
                (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal
                          x)) (pr1 xx))
             (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
                (nat_z_iso_inv
                   (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                      H_ff TC)) (pr11 x))) @
        idpath
          (nat_trans_comp
             (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_composite_data
                (pair_functor H H
                 ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                     TC) (pr11 x))
             (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
             (post_whisker
                (nat_z_iso_inv
                   (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                      H_ff TC)) (pr11 x))) @
        nat_trans_eq E
          (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
             (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
          (functor_composite_data
             (pair_functor H H
              ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
             (pr11 x))
          (nat_trans_comp
             (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_composite_data
                (pair_functor H H
                 ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                     TC) (pr11 x))
             (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
             (post_whisker
                (nat_z_iso_inv
                   (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                      H_ff TC)) (pr11 x)))
          (pre_whisker (pair_functor H H) (pr121 x))
          (λ cc : C ⊠ C,
           internal_paths_rew_r
             (E
              ⟦ TE
                  ((pr11 x) (H (pr1 cc)),
                  (pr11 x) (H (pr2 cc))),
              (pr11 x)
                (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
                   (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))) ⟧)
             ((pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))
              · # (pr11 x)
                  (rad_eps
                     [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                     D]
                     [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                     D]
                     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                        (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                        [precategory_binproduct_data D
                           D, D]
                        [precategory_binproduct_data C
                           C, D]
                        (is_univalent_functor_category
                           (precategory_binproduct_data
                              D D) D Duniv)
                        (pre_composition_functor
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                           (pair_functor H H))
                        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                           (pair_functor H H)
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))
                        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                           (pair_functor H H)
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc)
              · # (pr111 x)
                  (pr1
                     (inv_from_z_iso
                        (rad_eps
                           [precategory_binproduct_data
                              D D, D]
                           [precategory_binproduct_data
                              C C, D]
                           (pre_composition_functor
                              (...) (...) D (...))
                           (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                              [..., D] [..., D] (...)
                              (...) (...) (...))
                           (TC ∙ H),,
                         pr2
                           (rad_eps [..., D] [..., D]
                              (...) (...) (...)))) cc))
             ((pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))
              · (# (pr11 x)
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc)
                 · # (pr111 x)
                     (pr1
