                        (inv_from_z_iso
                           (rad_eps [..., D] [..., D]
                              (...) (...) (...),,
                            pr2 (...))) cc)))
             (λ p : E
                    ⟦ TE
                        ((pr11 x) (H (pr1 cc)),
                        (pr11 x) (H (pr2 cc))),
                    (pr11 x)
                      (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                         H_ff TC
                         (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))) ⟧,
              p =
              (pr112 (pr1 x)) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
             (internal_paths_rew
                (E
                 ⟦ (pr11 x)
                     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                        H_ff TC
                        (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))),
                 (pr11 x)
                   (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                      TC (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))) ⟧)
                (# (pr11 x)
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc
                    · pr1
                        (inv_from_z_iso
                           (rad_eps [..., D] [..., D]
                              (...) (...) (...),,
                            pr2 (...))) cc))
                (λ p : E
                       ⟦ (pr11 x)
                           (TransportedTensor Duniv
                              H_eso H_ff TC
                              (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))),
                       (pr11 x)
                         (TransportedTensor Duniv
                            H_eso H_ff TC
                            (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
                       ⟧,
                 (pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))
                 · p =
                 (pr112 (pr1 x))
                   (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
                (maponpaths
                   (compose
                      ((pr121 x)
                         (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))))
                   (maponpaths # (pr11 x)
                      (let X := λ c : C ⊠ C, pr2 (...)
                         in
                       let X0 := λ c : ..., pr1 ... in
                       X0 cc)) @
                 internal_paths_rew_r
                   (E
                    ⟦ (pr11 x)
                        ((pair_functor H H
                          ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv
                              H_eso H_ff TC) cc),
                    (pr11 x)
                      ((pair_functor H H
                        ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv
                            H_eso H_ff TC) cc) ⟧)
                   (# (pr11 x)
                      (id (pair_functor H H
                           ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv
                               H_eso H_ff TC) cc))
                   (id (pr11 x)
                         ((pair_functor H H
                           ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv
                               H_eso H_ff TC) cc))
                   (λ p : E ⟦ (pr11 x) ((...) cc),
                          (pr11 x) ((...) cc) ⟧,
                    (pr121 x) (H (...), H (...)) · p =
                    (pr112 (pr1 x))
                      (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
                   (id_right
                      ((pr112 (pr1 x))
                         (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))))
                   (functor_id (pr11 x)
                      ((pair_functor H H
                        ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv
                            H_eso H_ff TC) cc)))
                (# (pr11 x)
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc)
                 · # (pr11 x)
                     (pr1
                        (inv_from_z_iso
                           (rad_eps [..., D] [..., D]
                              (...) (...) (...),,
                            pr2 (...))) cc))
                (functor_comp (pr11 x)
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc)
                   (pr1
                      (inv_from_z_iso
                         (rad_eps
                            [precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D, D]
                            [precategory_binproduct_data
                               C C, D]
                            (pre_composition_functor
                               ... ... D ...)
                            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                               ... ... ... ... ... ...)
                            (TC ∙ H),,
                          pr2
                            (rad_eps ... ... ... ...
                               ...))) cc)))
             (assoc'
                ((pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
                (# (pr11 x)
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc))
                (# (pr111 x)
                   (pr1
                      (inv_from_z_iso
                         (rad_eps
                            [precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D, D]
                            [precategory_binproduct_data
                               C C, D]
                            (pre_composition_functor
                               ... ... D ...)
                            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                               ... ... ... ... ... ...)
                            (TC ∙ H),,
                          pr2
                            (rad_eps ... ... ... ...
                               ...))) cc)))
           :
           nat_trans_comp
             (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_composite_data
                (pair_functor H H
                 ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                     TC) (pr11 x))
             (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
             (post_whisker
                (nat_z_iso_inv
                   (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                      H_ff TC)) (pr11 x)) cc =
           pre_whisker (pair_functor H H) (pr121 x) cc))
     in
   internal_paths_rew
     (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x)
      ⟹ functor_tensor_map_codom
          (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
          (pr11 x)) (pr1 i)
     (λ n : functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x)
            ⟹ functor_tensor_map_codom
                (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
                (pr11 x), is_nat_z_iso n) (pr2 i)
     (pr121 x) p)

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
x: total_category
  (functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE)
xx: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat lu luE ru ruE α
  αE (total_functor precompMonoidal x)
a: is_z_isomorphism
  (pr221 x · id (pr11 x) (LiftedTensorUnit.ID I))
(λ _ : is_nat_z_iso
         (pr121 x
          :
          functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x)
          ⟹ functor_tensor_map_codom
              (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
              (pr11 x)), is_z_isomorphism (pr221 x))
  (let i :=
     lift_nat_z_iso_along (E,, Euniv)
       (pair_functor H H)
       (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
       (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
       (nat_z_iso_comp
          (make_nat_z_iso
             (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
             (pr1 xx))
          (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_inv
                (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                   H_ff TC)) (pr11 x))) in
   let p :=
     lift_nat_trans_eq_along (E,, Euniv)
       (pair_functor H H)
       (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
       (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
       (lift_nat_trans_along_comm (E,, Euniv)
          (pair_functor H H)
          (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
          (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
          (nat_z_iso_comp
             (make_nat_z_iso
                (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                   (pr11 (total_functor
                            precompMonoidal x)))
                (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                   (pr11 (total_functor
                            precompMonoidal x)))
                (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal
                          x)) (pr1 xx))
             (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
                (nat_z_iso_inv
                   (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                      H_ff TC)) (pr11 x))) @
        idpath
          (nat_trans_comp
             (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_composite_data
                (pair_functor H H
                 ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                     TC) (pr11 x))
             (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
             (post_whisker
                (nat_z_iso_inv
                   (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                      H_ff TC)) (pr11 x))) @
        nat_trans_eq E
          (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
             (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
          (functor_composite_data
             (pair_functor H H
              ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
             (pr11 x))
          (nat_trans_comp
             (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_composite_data
                (pair_functor H H
                 ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                     TC) (pr11 x))
             (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
             (post_whisker
                (nat_z_iso_inv
                   (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                      H_ff TC)) (pr11 x)))
          (pre_whisker (pair_functor H H) (pr121 x))
          (λ cc : C ⊠ C,
           internal_paths_rew_r
             (E
              ⟦ TE
                  ((pr11 x) (H (pr1 cc)),
                  (pr11 x) (H (pr2 cc))),
              (pr11 x)
                (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
                   (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))) ⟧)
             ((pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))
              · # (pr11 x)
                  (rad_eps
                     [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                     D]
                     [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                     D]
                     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                        (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                        [precategory_binproduct_data D
                           D, D]
                        [precategory_binproduct_data C
                           C, D]
                        (is_univalent_functor_category
                           (precategory_binproduct_data
                              D D) D Duniv)
                        (pre_composition_functor
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                           (pair_functor H H))
                        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                           (pair_functor H H)
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))
                        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                           (pair_functor H H)
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc)
              · # (pr111 x)
                  (pr1
                     (inv_from_z_iso
                        (rad_eps
                           [precategory_binproduct_data
                              D D, D]
                           [precategory_binproduct_data
                              C C, D]
                           (pre_composition_functor
                              (...) (...) D (...))
                           (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                              [..., D] [..., D] (...)
                              (...) (...) (...))
                           (TC ∙ H),,
                         pr2
                           (rad_eps [..., D] [..., D]
                              (...) (...) (...)))) cc))
             ((pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))
              · (# (pr11 x)
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc)
                 · # (pr111 x)
                     (pr1
                        (inv_from_z_iso
                           (rad_eps [..., D] [..., D]
                              (...) (...) (...),,
                            pr2 (...))) cc)))
             (λ p : E
                    ⟦ TE
                        ((pr11 x) (H (pr1 cc)),
                        (pr11 x) (H (pr2 cc))),
                    (pr11 x)
                      (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                         H_ff TC
                         (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))) ⟧,
              p =
              (pr112 (pr1 x)) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
             (internal_paths_rew
                (E
                 ⟦ (pr11 x)
                     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                        H_ff TC
                        (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))),
                 (pr11 x)
                   (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                      TC (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))) ⟧)
                (# (pr11 x)
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc
                    · pr1
                        (inv_from_z_iso
                           (rad_eps [..., D] [..., D]
                              (...) (...) (...),,
                            pr2 (...))) cc))
                (λ p : E
                       ⟦ (pr11 x)
                           (TransportedTensor Duniv
                              H_eso H_ff TC
                              (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))),
                       (pr11 x)
                         (TransportedTensor Duniv
                            H_eso H_ff TC
                            (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
                       ⟧,
                 (pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))
                 · p =
                 (pr112 (pr1 x))
                   (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
                (maponpaths
                   (compose
                      ((pr121 x)
                         (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))))
                   (maponpaths # (pr11 x)
                      (let X := λ c : C ⊠ C, pr2 (...)
                         in
                       let X0 := λ c : ..., pr1 ... in
                       X0 cc)) @
                 internal_paths_rew_r
                   (E
                    ⟦ (pr11 x)
                        ((pair_functor H H
                          ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv
                              H_eso H_ff TC) cc),
                    (pr11 x)
                      ((pair_functor H H
                        ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv
                            H_eso H_ff TC) cc) ⟧)
                   (# (pr11 x)
                      (id (pair_functor H H
                           ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv
                               H_eso H_ff TC) cc))
                   (id (pr11 x)
                         ((pair_functor H H
                           ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv
                               H_eso H_ff TC) cc))
                   (λ p : E ⟦ (pr11 x) ((...) cc),
                          (pr11 x) ((...) cc) ⟧,
                    (pr121 x) (H (...), H (...)) · p =
                    (pr112 (pr1 x))
                      (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
                   (id_right
                      ((pr112 (pr1 x))
                         (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))))
                   (functor_id (pr11 x)
                      ((pair_functor H H
                        ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv
                            H_eso H_ff TC) cc)))
                (# (pr11 x)
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc)
                 · # (pr11 x)
                     (pr1
                        (inv_from_z_iso
                           (rad_eps [..., D] [..., D]
                              (...) (...) (...),,
                            pr2 (...))) cc))
                (functor_comp (pr11 x)
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc)
                   (pr1
                      (inv_from_z_iso
                         (rad_eps
                            [precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D, D]
                            [precategory_binproduct_data
                               C C, D]
                            (pre_composition_functor
                               ... ... D ...)
                            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                               ... ... ... ... ... ...)
                            (TC ∙ H),,
                          pr2
                            (rad_eps ... ... ... ...
                               ...))) cc)))
             (assoc'
                ((pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
                (# (pr11 x)
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc))
                (# (pr111 x)
                   (pr1
                      (inv_from_z_iso
                         (rad_eps
                            [precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D, D]
                            [precategory_binproduct_data
                               C C, D]
                            (pre_composition_functor
                               ... ... D ...)
                            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                               ... ... ... ... ... ...)
                            (TC ∙ H),,
                          pr2
                            (rad_eps ... ... ... ...
                               ...))) cc)))
           :
           nat_trans_comp
             (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_composite_data
                (pair_functor H H
                 ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                     TC) (pr11 x))
             (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
             (post_whisker
                (nat_z_iso_inv
                   (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                      H_ff TC)) (pr11 x)) cc =
           pre_whisker (pair_functor H H) (pr121 x) cc))
     in
   internal_paths_rew
     (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x)
      ⟹ functor_tensor_map_codom
          (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
          (pr11 x)) (pr1 i)
     (λ n : functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x)
            ⟹ functor_tensor_map_codom
                (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
                (pr11 x), is_nat_z_iso n) (pr2 i)
     (pr121 x) p)

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
x: total_category
  (functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE)
xx: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat lu luE ru ruE α
  αE (total_functor precompMonoidal x)
a: is_z_isomorphism (pr221 x)
(λ _ : is_nat_z_iso
         (pr121 x
          :
          functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x)
          ⟹ functor_tensor_map_codom
              (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
              (pr11 x)), is_z_isomorphism (pr221 x))
  (let i :=
     lift_nat_z_iso_along (E,, Euniv)
       (pair_functor H H)
       (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
       (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
       (nat_z_iso_comp
          (make_nat_z_iso
             (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
             (pr1 xx))
          (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_inv
                (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                   H_ff TC)) (pr11 x))) in
   let p :=
     lift_nat_trans_eq_along (E,, Euniv)
       (pair_functor H H)
       (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
       (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
       (lift_nat_trans_along_comm (E,, Euniv)
          (pair_functor H H)
          (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
          (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
          (nat_z_iso_comp
             (make_nat_z_iso
                (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                   (pr11 (total_functor
                            precompMonoidal x)))
                (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                   (pr11 (total_functor
                            precompMonoidal x)))
                (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal
                          x)) (pr1 xx))
             (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
                (nat_z_iso_inv
                   (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                      H_ff TC)) (pr11 x))) @
        idpath
          (nat_trans_comp
             (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_composite_data
                (pair_functor H H
                 ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                     TC) (pr11 x))
             (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
             (post_whisker
                (nat_z_iso_inv
                   (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                      H_ff TC)) (pr11 x))) @
        nat_trans_eq E
          (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
             (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
          (functor_composite_data
             (pair_functor H H
              ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
             (pr11 x))
          (nat_trans_comp
             (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_composite_data
                (pair_functor H H
                 ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                     TC) (pr11 x))
             (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
             (post_whisker
                (nat_z_iso_inv
                   (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                      H_ff TC)) (pr11 x)))
          (pre_whisker (pair_functor H H) (pr121 x))
          (λ cc : C ⊠ C,
           internal_paths_rew_r
             (E
              ⟦ TE
                  ((pr11 x) (H (pr1 cc)),
                  (pr11 x) (H (pr2 cc))),
              (pr11 x)
                (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
                   (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))) ⟧)
             ((pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))
              · # (pr11 x)
                  (rad_eps
                     [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                     D]
                     [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                     D]
                     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                        (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                        [precategory_binproduct_data D
                           D, D]
                        [precategory_binproduct_data C
                           C, D]
                        (is_univalent_functor_category
                           (precategory_binproduct_data
                              D D) D Duniv)
                        (pre_composition_functor
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                           (pair_functor H H))
                        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                           (pair_functor H H)
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))
                        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                           (pair_functor H H)
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc)
              · # (pr111 x)
                  (pr1
                     (inv_from_z_iso
                        (rad_eps
                           [precategory_binproduct_data
                              D D, D]
                           [precategory_binproduct_data
                              C C, D]
                           (pre_composition_functor
                              (...) (...) D (...))
                           (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                              [..., D] [..., D] (...)
                              (...) (...) (...))
                           (TC ∙ H),,
                         pr2
                           (rad_eps [..., D] [..., D]
                              (...) (...) (...)))) cc))
             ((pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))
              · (# (pr11 x)
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc)
                 · # (pr111 x)
                     (pr1
                        (inv_from_z_iso
                           (rad_eps [..., D] [..., D]
                              (...) (...) (...),,
                            pr2 (...))) cc)))
             (λ p : E
                    ⟦ TE
                        ((pr11 x) (H (pr1 cc)),
                        (pr11 x) (H (pr2 cc))),
                    (pr11 x)
                      (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                         H_ff TC
                         (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))) ⟧,
              p =
              (pr112 (pr1 x)) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
             (internal_paths_rew
                (E
                 ⟦ (pr11 x)
                     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                        H_ff TC
                        (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))),
                 (pr11 x)
                   (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                      TC (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))) ⟧)
                (# (pr11 x)
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc
                    · pr1
                        (inv_from_z_iso
                           (rad_eps [..., D] [..., D]
                              (...) (...) (...),,
                            pr2 (...))) cc))
                (λ p : E
                       ⟦ (pr11 x)
                           (TransportedTensor Duniv
                              H_eso H_ff TC
                              (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))),
                       (pr11 x)
                         (TransportedTensor Duniv
                            H_eso H_ff TC
                            (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
                       ⟧,
                 (pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))
                 · p =
                 (pr112 (pr1 x))
                   (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
                (maponpaths
                   (compose
                      ((pr121 x)
                         (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))))
                   (maponpaths # (pr11 x)
                      (let X := λ c : C ⊠ C, pr2 (...)
                         in
                       let X0 := λ c : ..., pr1 ... in
                       X0 cc)) @
                 internal_paths_rew_r
                   (E
                    ⟦ (pr11 x)
                        ((pair_functor H H
                          ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv
                              H_eso H_ff TC) cc),
                    (pr11 x)
                      ((pair_functor H H
                        ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv
                            H_eso H_ff TC) cc) ⟧)
                   (# (pr11 x)
                      (id (pair_functor H H
                           ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv
                               H_eso H_ff TC) cc))
                   (id (pr11 x)
                         ((pair_functor H H
                           ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv
                               H_eso H_ff TC) cc))
                   (λ p : E ⟦ (pr11 x) ((...) cc),
                          (pr11 x) ((...) cc) ⟧,
                    (pr121 x) (H (...), H (...)) · p =
                    (pr112 (pr1 x))
                      (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
                   (id_right
                      ((pr112 (pr1 x))
                         (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))))
                   (functor_id (pr11 x)
                      ((pair_functor H H
                        ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv
                            H_eso H_ff TC) cc)))
                (# (pr11 x)
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc)
                 · # (pr11 x)
                     (pr1
                        (inv_from_z_iso
                           (rad_eps [..., D] [..., D]
                              (...) (...) (...),,
                            pr2 (...))) cc))
                (functor_comp (pr11 x)
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc)
                   (pr1
                      (inv_from_z_iso
                         (rad_eps
                            [precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D, D]
                            [precategory_binproduct_data
                               C C, D]
                            (pre_composition_functor
                               ... ... D ...)
                            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                               ... ... ... ... ... ...)
                            (TC ∙ H),,
                          pr2
                            (rad_eps ... ... ... ...
                               ...))) cc)))
             (assoc'
                ((pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
                (# (pr11 x)
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv
                            (pair_functor H H)
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H) cc))
                (# (pr111 x)
                   (pr1
                      (inv_from_z_iso
                         (rad_eps
                            [precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D, D]
                            [precategory_binproduct_data
                               C C, D]
                            (pre_composition_functor
                               ... ... D ...)
                            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                               ... ... ... ... ... ...)
                            (TC ∙ H),,
                          pr2
                            (rad_eps ... ... ... ...
                               ...))) cc)))
           :
           nat_trans_comp
             (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
             (functor_composite_data
                (pair_functor H H
                 ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                     TC) (pr11 x))
             (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
             (post_whisker
                (nat_z_iso_inv
                   (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                      H_ff TC)) (pr11 x)) cc =
           pre_whisker (pair_functor H H) (pr121 x) cc))
     in
   internal_paths_rew
     (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x)
      ⟹ functor_tensor_map_codom
          (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
          (pr11 x)) (pr1 i)
     (λ n : functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x)
            ⟹ functor_tensor_map_codom
                (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
                (pr11 x), is_nat_z_iso n) (pr2 i)
     (pr121 x) p)

        exact a.
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
x: total_category
  (functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE)
xx: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat lu luE ru ruE α
  αE (total_functor precompMonoidal x)
(λ yy : functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD
          ruE αD αE x,
 Isos.z_iso_disp
   (identity_z_iso (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
   (precompStrongMonoidal x yy) xx)
  ((let i :=
      lift_nat_z_iso_along (E,, Euniv)
        (pair_functor H H)
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
        (nat_z_iso_comp
           (make_nat_z_iso
              (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                 (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal
                          x)))
              (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                 (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal
                          x)))
              (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
              (pr1 xx))
           (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
              (nat_z_iso_inv
                 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                    H_ff TC)) (pr11 x))) in
    let p :=
      lift_nat_trans_eq_along (E,, Euniv)
        (pair_functor H H)
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
        (lift_nat_trans_along_comm (E,, Euniv)
           (pair_functor H H)
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)
           (nat_z_iso_comp
              (make_nat_z_iso
                 (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                    (pr11 (total_functor
                             precompMonoidal x)))
                 (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                    (pr11 (total_functor
                             precompMonoidal x)))
                 (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal
                           x)) (pr1 xx))
              (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_inv
                    (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC)) (pr11 x))) @
         idpath
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                 (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal
                          x)))
              (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                 (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal
                          x)))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pair_functor H H
                  ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                      TC) (pr11 x))
              (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
              (post_whisker
                 (nat_z_iso_inv
                    (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC)) (pr11 x))) @
         nat_trans_eq E
           (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
              (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal x)))
           (functor_composite_data
              (pair_functor H H
               ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
              (pr11 x))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                 (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal
                          x)))
              (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                 (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal
                          x)))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pair_functor H H
                  ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                      TC) (pr11 x))
              (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
              (post_whisker
                 (nat_z_iso_inv
                    (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC)) (pr11 x)))
           (pre_whisker (pair_functor H H) (pr121 x))
           (λ cc : C ⊠ C,
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (E
               ⟦ TE
                   ((pr11 x) (H (pr1 cc)),
                   (pr11 x) (H (pr2 cc))),
               (pr11 x)
                 (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                    TC (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))) ⟧)
              ((pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))
               · # (pr11 x)
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D (pair_functor H H))
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (...) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (...) (...) D (...))
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (...) (...) D (...) (...)
                            (...))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (...) (...) D Duniv (...)
                            (...) (...))) (TC ∙ H) cc)
               · # (pr111 x)
                   (pr1
                      (inv_from_z_iso
                         (rad_eps [..., D] [..., D]
                            (...) (...) (...),,
                          pr2 (...))) cc))
              ((pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))
               · (# (pr11 x)
                    (rad_eps
                       [precategory_binproduct_data D
                          D, D]
                       [precategory_binproduct_data C
                          C, D]
                       (pre_composition_functor
                          (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                          (pair_functor H H))
                       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                          [precategory_binproduct_data
                             D D, D]
                          [precategory_binproduct_data
                             C C, D]
                          (is_univalent_functor_category
                             ... D Duniv)
                          (pre_composition_functor ...
                             ... D ...)
                          (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                             ... ... D ... ... ...)
                          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                             ... ... D Duniv ... ...
                             ...)) (TC ∙ H) cc)
                  · # (pr111 x)
                      (pr1
                         (inv_from_z_iso (...,, ...))
                         cc)))
              (λ p : E
                     ⟦ TE
                         ((pr11 x) (H (pr1 cc)),
                         (pr11 x) (H (pr2 cc))),
                     (pr11 x)
                       (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                          H_ff TC
                          (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))) ⟧,
               p =
               (pr112 (pr1 x))
                 (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
              (internal_paths_rew
                 (E
                  ⟦ (pr11 x)
                      (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                         H_ff TC
                         (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))),
                  (pr11 x)
                    (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC
                       (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))) ⟧)
                 (# (pr11 x)
                    (rad_eps
                       [precategory_binproduct_data D
                          D, D]
                       [precategory_binproduct_data C
                          C, D]
                       (pre_composition_functor
                          (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                          (pair_functor H H))
                       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                          [precategory_binproduct_data
                             D D, D]
                          [precategory_binproduct_data
                             C C, D]
                          (is_univalent_functor_category
                             ... D Duniv)
                          (pre_composition_functor ...
                             ... D ...)
                          (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                             ... ... D ... ... ...)
                          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                             ... ... D Duniv ... ...
                             ...)) (TC ∙ H) cc
                     · pr1
                         (inv_from_z_iso (...,, ...))
                         cc))
                 (λ p : E
                        ⟦ (pr11 x)
                            (TransportedTensor Duniv
                               H_eso H_ff TC
                               (H ..., H ...)),
                        (pr11 x)
                          (TransportedTensor Duniv
                             H_eso H_ff TC
                             (H ..., H ...)) ⟧,
                  (pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc))
                  · p =
                  (pr112 (pr1 x))
                    (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
                 (maponpaths
                    (compose
                       ((pr121 x) (H ..., H ...)))
                    (maponpaths # (pr11 x)
                       (let X := λ ..., ... in
                        let X0 := ... in X0 cc)) @
                  internal_paths_rew_r
                    (E ⟦ (pr11 x) ((...) cc),
                     (pr11 x) ((...) cc) ⟧)
                    (# (pr11 x) (id (... ∙ ...) cc))
                    (id (pr11 x) ((... ∙ ...) cc))
                    (λ p : E ⟦ (pr11 x) (...),
                           (pr11 x) (...) ⟧,
                     (pr121 x) (..., ...) · p =
                     (pr112 (...)) (H ..., H ...))
                    (id_right
                       ((pr112 (...)) (H ..., H ...)))
                    (functor_id (pr11 x)
                       ((... ∙ ...) cc)))
                 (# (pr11 x)
                    (rad_eps
                       [precategory_binproduct_data D
                          D, D]
                       [precategory_binproduct_data C
                          C, D]
                       (pre_composition_functor
                          (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                          (pair_functor H H))
                       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                          [precategory_binproduct_data
                             D D, D]
                          [precategory_binproduct_data
                             C C, D]
                          (is_univalent_functor_category
                             ... D Duniv)
                          (pre_composition_functor ...
                             ... D ...)
                          (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                             ... ... D ... ... ...)
                          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                             ... ... D Duniv ... ...
                             ...)) (TC ∙ H) cc)
                  · # (pr11 x)
                      (pr1
                         (inv_from_z_iso (...,, ...))
                         cc))
                 (functor_comp (pr11 x)
                    (rad_eps
                       [precategory_binproduct_data D
                          D, D]
                       [precategory_binproduct_data C
                          C, D]
                       (pre_composition_functor
                          (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                          (pair_functor H H))
                       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                          [precategory_binproduct_data
                             D D, D]
                          [precategory_binproduct_data
                             C C, D]
                          (is_univalent_functor_category
                             (...) D Duniv)
                          (pre_composition_functor
                             (...) (...) D (...))
                          (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                             (...) (...) D (...) (...)
                             (...))
                          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                             (...) (...) D Duniv (...)
                             (...) (...))) (TC ∙ H) cc)
                    (pr1
                       (inv_from_z_iso
                          (rad_eps ... ... ... ... ...,,
                           pr2 ...)) cc)))
              (assoc'
                 ((pr121 x) (H (pr1 cc), H (pr2 cc)))
                 (# (pr11 x)
                    (rad_eps
                       [precategory_binproduct_data D
                          D, D]
                       [precategory_binproduct_data C
                          C, D]
                       (pre_composition_functor
                          (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
                          (pair_functor H H))
                       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                          [precategory_binproduct_data
                             D D, D]
                          [precategory_binproduct_data
                             C C, D]
                          (is_univalent_functor_category
                             (...) D Duniv)
                          (pre_composition_functor
                             (...) (...) D (...))
                          (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                             (...) (...) D (...) (...)
                             (...))
                          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                             (...) (...) D Duniv (...)
                             (...) (...))) (TC ∙ H) cc))
                 (# (pr111 x)
                    (pr1
                       (inv_from_z_iso
                          (rad_eps ... ... ... ... ...,,
                           pr2 ...)) cc)))
            :
            nat_trans_comp
              (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
                 (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal
                          x)))
              (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
                 (pr11 (total_functor precompMonoidal
                          x)))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pair_functor H H
                  ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                      TC) (pr11 x))
              (pr121 (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
              (post_whisker
                 (nat_z_iso_inv
                    (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC)) (pr11 x)) cc =
            pre_whisker (pair_functor H H) (pr121 x)
              cc)) in
    internal_paths_rew
      (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x)
       ⟹ functor_tensor_map_codom
           (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
           (pr11 x)) (pr1 i)
      (λ n : functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr11 x)
             ⟹ functor_tensor_map_codom
                 (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                    TC) (pr11 x), is_nat_z_iso n)
      (pr2 i) (pr121 x) p),,
   (let a := pr2 xx in
    let a0 :=
      internal_paths_rew
        (E ⟦ (pr11 x) (LiftedTensorUnit.ID I),
         (pr11 x) (LiftedTensorUnit.ID I) ⟧)
        (# (pr11 x) (id LiftedTensorUnit.ID I))
        (λ p : E ⟦ (pr11 x) (LiftedTensorUnit.ID I),
               (pr11 x) (LiftedTensorUnit.ID I) ⟧,
         is_z_isomorphism (pr221 x · p)) a
        (id (pr11 x) (LiftedTensorUnit.ID I))
        (functor_id (pr11 x) (LiftedTensorUnit.ID I))
      in
    let a1 :=
      internal_paths_rew
        (E ⟦ IE, (pr11 x) (LiftedTensorUnit.ID I) ⟧)
        (pr221 x · id (pr11 x) (LiftedTensorUnit.ID I))
        (λ p : E ⟦ IE,
               (pr11 x) (LiftedTensorUnit.ID I) ⟧,
         is_z_isomorphism p) a0 (pr221 x)
        (id_right (pr221 x)) in
    a1))
 
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
x: total_category
  (functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE)
xx: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat lu luE ru ruE α
  αE (total_functor precompMonoidal x)
Isos.is_disp_inverse
  (identity_z_iso (total_functor precompMonoidal x))
  tt tt

      split ; apply isapropunit.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
fully_faithful (total_functor precompMonoidal)

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
disp_functor_ff precompStrongMonoidal
 exact precompStrongMonoidal_ff.
  Qed.

H: C ⟶ D

H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α

ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E

ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
is_univalent
  (total_category
     (functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE))

Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
Univalence.is_univalent_disp
  (functor_monoidal_disp_cat lu luE ru ruE α αE)

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
is_univalent (functor_tensorunit_cat TC TE I IE)

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
is_univalent
  (total_category
     (functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE
        αD αE))

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
∏ x : functor_monoidal_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE,
isaprop
  (is_nat_z_iso (pr121 x) × is_z_isomorphism (pr221 x))

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

isaprop (is_nat_z_iso (pr121 x))

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
adj_equivalence_of_cats

TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
x: functor_monoidal_cat lu luE ru ruE α αE
isaprop (is_z_isomorphism (pr221 x))

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
x: functor_monoidal_cat lu luE ru ruE α αE
isaprop (is_nat_z_iso (pr121 x))
 apply NaturalTransformations.isaprop_is_nat_z_iso.
        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
ru: right_unitor TC I
α: associator TC
tri: triangle_eq TC I lu ru α
pent: pentagon_eq TC α
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
ID:= H I: D
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I lu: left_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I ru: right_unitor
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) 
  (H I)
αD:= TransportedAssociator Duniv H_eso H_ff TC α: associator
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αE: associator TE
x: functor_monoidal_cat lu luE ru ruE α αE
isaprop (is_z_isomorphism (pr221 x))
 apply Isos.isaprop_is_z_isomorphism.
  Defined.

End RezkMonoidal.
